description:
Relax at this peaceful place to stay.

The space
Welcome to Bloom Stay - your peaceful retreat right in the bustling transit heart of Chennai! Whether you are traveling for business, a family trip, or medical transit, our twin apartments are designed to offer the perfect blend of hotel-style comfort and the warmth of a real home.

📌 The Space
Step inside to a bright, fully furnished, and modern space. We have intentionally styled this apartment to feel like a home, not just a rental. You will find a cozy living area, plush bedding, a functional kitchen, and high-speed Wi-Fi to keep you connected.

💡 Traveling with a large group? We own two identical apartments directly opposite each other! Book both to stay right next to your family or colleagues while enjoying your own private spaces.

🚗 Location & Parking (Good to Know!)
We are tucked away in a quiet, smaller residential lane, keeping you safe from the loud honking of the main Koyambedu traffic.

Yes, we have dedicated car parking! Navigating the narrow approach road requires a bit of careful driving, but once you arrive, you have a secure, designated spot waiting for you.

Unbeatable Connectivity: We are just minutes away from the Koyambedu Metro Station, CMBT Bus Terminus, and major marriage halls and hospitals.

🏡 House Rules: Treat It Like Your Own
We have put a lot of love, care, and effort into making this space beautiful and comfortable for you. In return, we kindly ask that you treat our apartment with the same love and respect as you would your own home. Kindly turn off the ACs and appliances when stepping out to help us conserve energy.

Keep the space reasonably tidy during your stay.



🛡️ Safety & Privacy
Your peace of mind is our priority. The building features 24/7 exterior security cameras monitoring the main entrance and external hallways for your safety. Rest assured, there are absolutely no cameras inside the apartment, your indoor privacy is 100% guaranteed.

We can’t wait to host you at Bloom Stay!
Feel free to message us if you have any questions before booking.

Guest access
During your stay, you will have full, exclusive access to your entire private apartment. No spaces inside the apartment are shared.

What is included in your access:

Entire Apartment: Private living room, bedrooms, bathrooms, and a fully functional kitchen.

Parking: Access to one dedicated, secure car parking space on the ground floor (please note the approach road is a narrow residential lane, so careful driving is required).

Common Areas: The building's main staircase, elevator, and the shared external hallway leading to your door.


Check-in & Privacy:

This is a completely self-contained unit.

You will receive a unique digital lock code or key access code prior to arrival for a seamless self-check-in.

description:
This is a cozy 2 bedroom apartment (ground floor) with all amenities. It is centrally located in a peaceful residential area (Adyar) close to public transport, restaurants / dining and the beach. This spacious and neat home will be ideal for short stays for families and business travelers.

The space
It is a 2BHK ground-floor apartment of approx. 1000 sqft area with the following amenities:
Two air-conditioned bedrooms
Master bedroom with a queen size bed, wardrobe and a dressing table.
Second bed room with 2 single beds and wardrobe.
Fully equipped kitchen with refrigerator, gas and microwave oven, with enough kitchen-ware like cooking vessels, crockery, cutlery, glasses, etc.
A fully automatic Washing-Machine in the laundry area.
Spacious Hall and dining area with comfortable furniture. The hall also has an LED TV with TataSky dish connection available.
2 bathrooms - 1 attached to the master bedroom and the other is common. Both bathrooms are neatly tiled and fitted with shower mixer, water heater and western WC.
Bath Towels and toiletry items (soap and shampoo) are available.
The apartment also has back up power unit to operate lights and fans in case of main power failure.

Guest access
The apartment is on the ground floor.
Facility for 4 wheeler parking is not available inside the compound. But street side parking is usually available just outside the apartment gate.

Other things to note
Being a quiet residential neighborhood, please be sensitive to avoid loud noise, adhere to No smoking and parking policies of the apartment complex.
Owing to the water shortage faced by the city on the whole, in the apartment too, water is available in the main tap only for an hour and a half in the morning from 6.30-8 am. There is borewell connection in the toilets, so borewell water is available in the toilets. There is a 250 ltr tank inside the house with connection in the kitchen and one bathroom (attached bathroom).

⚡ Work-Ready: 75Mbps WiFi + Desk.
🛡️ Safe & Homely: Ancestral family building, city center.

The space
The Apartment: You have private access to the entire 900 sqft home. We designed it to be a peaceful retreat from the buzzing street below.

🛏️ Bedroom 1 (The King Suite):

A spacious room featuring a King-size bed with fresh linens and brand-new AC.

The Layout: Includes a private balcony for fresh air and a dedicated private bathroom located just outside the room door (Split layout).

🛏️ Bedroom 2 (The Queen Suite):

A cozy room with a Queen-size bed and AC.

The Layout: Features a private Ensuite bathroom attached inside the room for total privacy.

🛋️ Living & Work:

Relax in the wooden seating area surrounded by local art.

Work: A dedicated desk with power backup for lights/fans ensures your work day is uninterrupted.

Who fits best: Families, all Couples, Women Travelers, and Business Guests looking for a safe, homely environment.

As this is our ancestral family building. We appreciate your respect for our family home!

Guest access
2nd Floor (Stairs Only): The apartment is located on the 2nd floor of a heritage building (No Lift). We recommend this space for guests comfortable with a short daily climb!

Contactless Check-In: We use a secure Lockbox system. You will receive the code 24 hours before arrival for a smooth entry at any time.

Getting Around: We are on a bustling historic street. There is NO parking on-site, but Uber/Ola cabs can pick you up right at the doorstep.

The space
Welcome to our cozy apartment in the heart of Mylapore, Chennai, a perfect retreat for travelers seeking comfort and convenience. Located just a stone's throw away from the revered Saibaba temple and the historic Kapaleeswarar temple, Ramakrishna Math our apartment acts as a centre point for all spiritual and cultural centres including the famous music sabhas like RR Sabha and Bharatiya Vidya bhavan that light up during the Margazhi season.

The living room neatly seats a sofa and a coffee table for you to chill after a day of exploring. The well-equipped kitchen allows you to prepare your favorite meals, adding a touch of home-cooked goodness to your stay. Having popular restaurants nearby adds convenience and variety to dining options. It's always nice to have a range of choices within a short walking distance.

A unique feature of the apartment is the separate room, with a wifi, table, and chairs that can be used as an office if you are a remote worker. A small library with collection of books on spirituality, self development, etc. Indoor games such as chess, carrom, board games also available.

The bedroom has a comfortable bed and soft linens, ensuring a peaceful night's sleep after your temple explorations. The bathroom is modern and stocked with essentials for your convenience. For the comfort and safety of all guests, we host married couples or immediate family members (brothers, sisters, parents with children) only.

Whether you're a spiritual traveler on a pilgrimage or a tourist or a remote worker eager to explore the rich heritage of Chennai, our apartment offers the ideal base!

Guest access
Guests can access the apartment which is on the 2nd floor of the building. There is no elevator in the building. However, the climb doesn’t feel tedious.

We are happy to welcome families — including married couples, parents, and children.

description:
Welcome to The Tiny Nook! 🌿

A unique 300 sq. ft. Duplex with a Private Terrace in busy are of Royapettah located in city center!

🛌 Sleeping • Bedroom: QueenBed + AC + Diwan SofaBed • Study Room: Dedicated work space • ❌ NO extra mattresses.

🏠 The Layout • Vertical Living: Split on 1st & 2nd floors (No Lift). • Bathroom: On 2nd Floor (Must climb stairs!). Bathroom is TINY.

⚠️ Narrow lane (Cab drops 10m away) •No Parking

✅ Power Backup, Fast 75Mbps WiFi, Full Kitchen & Laundry.

The space
🏠 Welcome to The Tiny Nook! A unique, budget-friendly private space in the heart of Royapettah.

🌟 A Nostalgic "Time Capsule" ✨ The Vibe: A compact 300 sq. ft. home spread across three vertical levels. 🕰️ Experience early 2000s Chennai architecture! This isn't a modern apartment chopped up—it was born a Tiny Home. Expect solid walls, a unique split-level layout, and the cozy character of a simpler time. 🔐 Privacy: You get the Whole Unit + Private Terrace to yourself! No sharing.

↕️ THE LAYOUT (Please Read) This is a vertical split-level home. You must use stairs to move between rooms.

1st Floor: Sleeping & Living 🛌

Master Bedroom: Comfortable Queen Bed with powerful Air Conditioner.
Living: A Diwan (2x4 ft) acting as a sofa or a cozy bed for an older child.
Kitchen: Fully equipped.

2nd Floor: Study & Hygiene 🚿

Study Room: Dedicated space with Table & Chair (Great for remote work).
The Bathroom: Fully functional (shower + toilet) but TINY/Compact.
⚠️ Note: You must walk UP stairs to use the bathroom (even at night).

3rd Floor: The Terrace 🌌

Private Terrace: Open space to relax under the stars.

🚫 Safety Note: The stairs and terrace are NOT Childproofed. Please be vigilant if bringing young children.

⚡ Tech, Safety & Backup

Power Backup: Inverter on-site (Lights & Fans only).
WiFi: Unlimited 30 Mbps (Good for streaming/calls).
Entry: Easy Self Check-in via lockbox.
Safety: CCTV Camera at the entrance.

🏡 Amenities

🍳 Kitchen: Fridge, stove, and cookware included.
🧺 Laundry: Free Washing Machine (Located in building common area).

📍 The Neighborhood (Rustic & Central)

Vibe: Authentic, busy residential area.
Access: Narrow lane. Cabs drop you 10 meters away (1-min walk).
Shop: Just 400m walk to Express Avenue (EA) Mall.

🏃‍♂️ Is The Tiny Nook right for you? ✅ YES: Couples, digital nomads, or backpackers wanting privacy, workspace, and power backup. ❌ NO: Elderly guests, those with knee pain (stairs), or families with toddlers (The space is not childproofed).

📩 Questions? Drop me a message for long-stay discounts!

Guest access
🛗❌ No Lift (Stairs Required) Please note this is a vertical, split-level home without an elevator.
1st Floor: Master Bedroom, Living Area, and Kitchen.
2nd Floor: Study Room and the Toilet/Bathroom.
3rd Floor: Your entirely Private Terrace.

ℹ️ Access Note

One additional room on the 2nd Floor remains locked (host storage).
Capacity: This listing is optimized for couples/duos. For groups larger than 2, please check my other listing!

🚕 Arrival & Drop-off

Narrow Lane: Four-wheelers (Cabs/Cars) cannot drive up to the doorstep.
The Last Mile: Vehicles will drop you at the street corner, and you will need to walk the last 10 meters to the house.
Don't worry, we provide a detailed arrival guide!

🚫🚙 Strictly NO Parking

On-Site: Parking is not available on the premises or in our immediate lane.
Street Parking: You may find free street parking further down the main road (subject to traffic rules), but we cannot assist with finding spots and are not responsible for safety or penalties.

Other things to note
✅ Included in Your Stay

☕ Basic Provisions: Complimentary Coffee & Tea starter pack.
⚡ Electricity: Normal usage is included. (Excess consumption is chargeable at Rs. 6 per unit).
🔌 Power Backup: Inverter provides up to 4 hours of backup for Ceiling Lights & Fans only. (AC/Geyser will not work on backup).
🌿 Private Terrace: Exclusive access for fresh air and relaxation.
🛏️ Linens: Fresh bedsheets provided on arrival (changed weekly for long stays).

❌ Not Included (Please Prepare)

🧻 Toiletries: No Towels or Toilet Paper provided. Please bring your own supplies.
🍲 Meals: Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner not provided. Use the kitchen or order in!
🧹 Daily Cleaning: Not included. Guests are requested to keep the home tidy.
🛏️ Extra Bedding: No extra mattresses available. (The Diwan in the living area serves as the second bed).
🛜 Internet: We strive for uptime, but if work is critical, please bring a personal hotspot (no refunds for outages).

💲 Paid Services & Add-ons
To make your stay flexible, we offer the following services upon request or if needed:

🍽️ Kitchen Cleanup Service: We love a clean kitchen! Standard policy is self-cleaning, but if you are in a rush and leave unwashed dishes, a cleaning service fee of Rs. 500 will be applied.
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Extra Guest Add-on: Want to bring a friend? Additional guests are welcome!
Fee: Rs. 1,000 per guest/night (through Airbnb).
🔑 Key Replacement: In the unfortunate event of lost keys, a replacement service is available for Rs. 2,000.

🚫 Strict House Rules (Zero Tolerance) For the safety and comfort of our neighbors, the following are strictly prohibited.

🚭 No Smoking Indoors: Smoking is strictly allowed on the Terrace Only (doors must be closed).
🤫 Quiet Hours: 11 PM – 7 AM. Please respect our neighbors.
🎊 No Parties: Loud music or unauthorized gatherings will result in immediate cancellation without refund.
🙅🏽 Unregistered Visitors: Only booked guests with ID are allowed inside.
🪪 ID Proof: Government photo ID is required for all guests immediately after booking confirmation.

ℹ️ Within minutes you can reach key places easily accessible via Bharathi Salai!

Nearest metro
* LIC metro station (1.7 Km)
* Government Estate metro station (1.7 Km)
* Thousand lights metro station (3.6 Km)

Nearby

- M. A. Chidambaram Stadium(1.8 Km)

- US Consulate (2.8 Km)

- Mylapore kapaleeshwara temple (3.9 km)
- Apollo Hospital (4.2 Km)

- T.Nagar (4.6 Km)
- Elliot's Beach (11 Km)
- Airport (16.6 Km)

🙏 If you have any questions or need assistance, please feel free to reach out. Your comfort is our priority!

🛌 Bedroom

===================

Kindly Please do not arrive before 12noon for checkin as we don’t have a waiting area.

Our home is designed as a "Zen" retreat in the heart of the city. The interiors feature warm wood accents, curated art, with a rooftop private swimming pool, the crown jewel of the property as our guests say.

box

description:
Spacious 600 square feet Designer 1BHK Suite with Private Balcony | High-Speed fibre optic Wi-Fi & Smart TV with streaming platforms, Work/Dining Desk, 24/7 power backup for uninterrupted work and comfort |Luxe King Bed & Orthopaedic Mattress ,wooden wardrobes for storage | fully equipped Kitchenette | Couch Bed in living room , Max.Occupancy 4 | Elevator access, professional housekeeping and access to paid laundry on site for long stays| Located in Central Bangalore | LGBTQIA++ Affirmative

The space
Step into your private sanctuary, one of four fully furnished 1BHK suites. Each spacious 600-square-foot unit is thoughtfully designed to be a comfortable retreat. The decor is inspired by unique Indian themes, offering a distinct and pleasing atmosphere. The suite is filled with natural light and cross-ventilation, with all windows equipped with mosquito nets so you can enjoy the city’s weather freely.

The living and dining space is beautifully designed, with a cozy dining nook that doubles as a comfortable workspace, complete with high-speed Wi-Fi and a Smart TV. The furniture is placed to ensure ample walking space, and its height is convenient for all guests, including senior citizens. The fully equipped kitchenette includes a high-tech water purifier, so you won’t need to purchase bottled water.

In the bedroom, you'll find a luxe king bed with a cushioned headboard and an orthopedic mattress for a restful night's sleep. For your convenience, all bed switches and charging points are placed right next to the bed, and electrical sockets are at a comfortable waist level. The bathroom is equipped with a shaving mirror, hairdryer, and dedicated vanity storage for your toiletries.

You’ll have two sets of curtains for complete light control and privacy. For your peace of mind, the property offers 24/7 power backup, air conditioning, and a washing and drying facility on a paid basis. The owners' private residence is on the upper floors, ensuring personal attention and added security

Artistic elements to look for in The Sundarbans Suite:

* **Earthy Walls:** Walls in a dual-tone of earthy moss and rich terracotta.
* **Tropical Weaves:** Vibrant fabrics inspired by the flora and fauna of the Sundarbans, used on the bespoke sofa.
* **Original Kolkata Art:** A hand-selected collection of original art and lithographs depicting scenes of Kolkata from a bygone era.
* **Teak Latticework Furniture:** Handcrafted teak wood furniture featuring traditional latticework.
* **Channel-Tufted Headboard:** A dramatic headboard upholstered in a fabric alive with toucans and tropical flora.
* **Kalighat-Style Wallpaper:** A bespoke wallpaper with an intricate pattern that subtly pays homage to the iconic Kalighat style of painting.
* **Floral Mosaic:** A stunning floor-to-ceiling mosaic with a floral design in the bathroom's walk-in shower.
* **Verdant Balcony:** A green oasis with hanging planters and flowering vines.

Guest access
You'll have exclusive and private access to the entire 1BHK suite. Guests also have access to ground floor parking, the plant-filled entry to the main building, and the elevator for your convenience. For all your laundry needs, our caretaker is available to assist you with the paid washing and drying facility. The property is secured by 24-hour security.

Neighborhood
Cooke Town offers a blend of old Bangalore charm with its tree-lined streets and colonial architecture, coupled with excellent connectivity to modern business and shopping hubs. It provides a peaceful residential environment that still feels connected to the city's pulse.

### Getting Around from Cooke Town

Local Transport
Airport (BLR):35-55 mins by cab.
Main Train Station: 30-40 mins by cab/auto.
Main Bus Station:** 30 mins by cab/auto.

Hospitals (within 45 mins)
Fortis Hospital:** ~10 mins
Manipal Hospital:** ~20 mins

Cultural & Business

Indiranagar:** ~20-25 mins

Other things to note
To ensure a comfortable stay for everyone, please be mindful of our house rules. Check-in is at 1:00 PM and check-out is at 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out is subject to availability and an hourly fee. Please note that quiet hours are from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM. For your safety, a valid government ID is required for all guests at check-in. The number of guests must match your reservation, and there are additional charges for extra guests or unregistered visitors staying overnight. Lastly, we kindly request you to water the plants on your balcony and bedroom window.

description:
Private 1BHK with Balcony in Koramangala

Experience premium living in a private 1BHK with balcony in upscale Koramangala. Ideal for couples, professionals, and business travelers, our modern units offer high-speed Wi-Fi, housekeeping, a fully equipped kitchen, access to a common terrace garden, washing machines, and dryers. Located near top cafes, restaurants, and offices, this peaceful stay combines comfort and convenience in one of Bangalore’s most vibrant neighborhoods.

The space
Fully private 1BHK Serviced apartment in one of Koramangala’s most premium and peaceful locations. Loved by guests and highly rated for safety, our serviced apartments offer a home-like stay with top-notch amenities.

Stylish & Thoughtfully Designed
Our 1BHK serviced apartments are crafted for families, corporate professionals, and groups of friends seeking a superior alternative to hotel rooms. Featuring tasteful interiors, premium furnishings, and ample space, each apartment includes:
✔️ A private balcony & common terrace garden for relaxation
✔️ Fully equipped private kitchen to cook your favorite meals or hire a professional cook
✔️ Spacious living with dining, creating a homely atmosphere

Prime Location – Heart of Koramangala
Stay just minutes away from vibrant cafés, parks, shopping hubs, and Bangalore’s finest restaurants. With seamless connectivity to business districts and Proximity to IT Hubs and Business Centers -Strategically located near Bellandur, Electronic City, Domlur, Sarjapur Road, and Outer Ring Road, making it ideal for corporate professionals and business travelers.

Unmatched Comfort & Modern Amenities
We prioritize your comfort with meticulously maintained, crystal-clean apartments. Enjoy:
✔️ Fresh linens, plush towels, and premium toiletries
✔️ High-speed Wi-Fi & Smart TV for seamless entertainment
✔️ Full power backup ensuring uninterrupted stays
✔️ Parking & lift access for added convenience
✔️ Washing and dryer facilities & RO water for a hassle-free experience
✔️ 24/7 CCTV security for complete peace of mind
We have 30 similar 1BHK units in the premises with lift access and ample parking space.

Enjoy a fully furnished 1BHK serviced apartment, thoughtfully equipped for a comfortable and homely stay. The bedrooms, living room, dining area, and kitchen are all beautifully furnished to meet your everyday needs.

Your private kitchen is fully functional and ready for use, featuring a Induction and all essential cookware and utensils including pots, pans, and a pressure cooker perfect for cooking full meals. It also includes modern appliances like a refrigerator, microwave, toaster, and electric kettle, ensuring ultimate convenience throughout your stay. A stylish, home-like stay with hotel-level convenience-ideal for both short and long stays.

Guest access
Non-Sharing 1BHK Serviced Apartment – Fully Private & Fully Equipped

Experience the comfort of a completely private, non-sharing 1BHK serviced apartment designed for hassle free stay. This entire unit is exclusively yours-with private entry, a private balcony, a fully equipped kitchen, and no shared spaces, ensuring total privacy and freedom during your stay.

Enjoy the convenience of your own kitchen, fitted with a Induction, essential utensils, and modern electronic appliances like a refrigerator, microwave, toaster, and electric kettle-perfect for home-style cooking.

Key features include:
- Fully functional kitchen
- Air-conditioned bedrooms for a cool and restful sleep
- 100% power backup for uninterrupted comfort
- Lift access at all times
- Parking for both 2-wheelers and 4-wheelers
- High-speed Wi-Fi with seamless connectivity for work or streaming
- Smart TV with access to popular apps for your entertainment
- Common laundry area with washing machines and dryers, accessible anytime
- Access to a beautiful terrace sit-out area, ideal for relaxing, working, or simply enjoying your day

Perfect for families, corporate travelers, friend's, Short/long-stay guests-this apartment offers a hassle-free, homely experience in a peaceful yet well-connected location.

#Luxurystay #Privateapartment #couplefriendly #1BHK #Koramangalaservicedapartment

Other things to note
House Rules & Property Guidelines

You're staying in a thoughtfully maintained, fully furnished apartment that belongs to someone who takes pride in offering a warm and welcoming space. We request you to treat the home with the same care and respect as you would your own.

Check-In & Check-Out
- Check-in: After 1:00 PM
- Check-out: Before 10:00 AM
- Self Check-In: Our building staff or friendly caretaker will assist with a smooth check-in process.

Occupancy & Stay Guidelines
- Maximum Guests: 3
- Please note, unmarried groups of 2 males & 1 female or 3 males & 1 female are not allowed. The apartment is ideal for families, married/unmarried couples, or female groups.
- This space is not suitable for parties, birthday celebrations, or loud gatherings to maintain the peace of the neighborhood and ensure a pleasant stay for all.
- Quiet Hours: 9:00 PM to 8:00 AM kindly avoid loud music or noise during this time.

During Your Stay
- Please ensure that all furniture, electronic appliances, and fixtures are used with care.
- Any damages or breakages caused during your stay will be chargeable.
- Our team or caretaker is available for any assistance you may need be it local guidance, cook hiring, cab bookings, or general support. He is friendly, speaks Hindi, and understands English, ensuring smooth communication and a comfortable stay.

We’ve created this space with a lot of attention to detail so that you can feel right at home. Your cooperation helps us continue providing a great experience to all our guests.

description:
MeowHaus is a private room in a quiet, thoughtfully lived-in penthouse in Hennur, Bangalore.
We live in the same home with our senior cat Kaalo and our baby.
This is a shared home : warm, respectful, and intentionally calm.
If you’re looking for a hotel or an OYO-style stay, MeowHaus may not be the right fit. If you enjoy lived-in homes, gentle routines, and sharing space with a cat, you’ll feel very comfortable here.

Check-in: After 1:00 PM
Check-out: By 10:00 AM

The space
🏡 Your stay at MeowHaus


Welcome to MeowHaus 🐾
A peaceful, cat-friendly penthouse designed around slow living and everyday comfort.
The home is ideal for guests who enjoy:
Quiet mornings with coffee
Natural light and fresh air
Calm, respectful shared spaces
A home that feels personal rather than transactional
MeowHaus is not a party space or a quick crash pad. It’s best suited for guests who value stillness, cleanliness, and mindful living. whether you’re working remotely, exploring Bangalore, or simply taking a pause.

🐱 Kaalo & our home
Kaalo, our senior indoor cat, is very much part of this home.
He’s calm, friendly, and mostly spends his day napping , but you will see him around.
If you enjoy the presence of cats, this will feel natural and comforting.
If you’re allergic to or uncomfortable around animals, this may not be the right stay.
Please note:
Kaalo is strictly an indoor cat
Letting him out of the main door or on the balcony is not permitted

📍 Location - Hennur, Bangalore
We’re conveniently located close to:
Manyata Tech Park — 3 km
Kammanahalli — 10 minutes
Kempegowda International Airport — approx. 33 km
The neighbourhood is residential and quiet, offering a break from the city’s constant rush.

🚶 Accessibility note
The penthouse is located on the second floor and does not have elevator access.
Please keep this in mind if stairs are a concern.
🐾 Pet-friendly home (ground floor)
A friendly family dog lives on the ground floor. She may bark briefly at first but is gentle and well-socialised.


Kitchen

The kitchen on the second floor is for personal use and is not shared with guests.
If guests need to cook, make tea, or boil water, a basic kitchenette is available on the first-floor balcony. Pots and pans are stored inside the house on the first floor. An electric kettle is also provided for your convenience.
Guests may use the refrigerator on the first floor and are welcome to sit and enjoy their meals on the first-floor balcony.
Please wash, clean, and return all utensils and items after use, and leave the space as you found it. Kindly dispose of all trash in the bin provided next to the refrigerator.


🧘 House guidelines (to keep MeowHaus calm & comfortable)
These aren’t rules for control , they’re simple habits that help everyone enjoy the space.

Toilet & Trash
Please do not flush sanitary waste, toilet paper, or trash. Use the dustbin provided.

Energy Use
Turn off AC, lights, and fans when not in use.
Water Usage
Please be mindful and avoid unnecessary water usage.

Noise
Keep noise levels low and be considerate of others in the home.

Care for the Space
Accidents happen, just let us know. Replacement costs will apply only if needed.

Kaalo’s Safety
Please ensure Kaalo does not exit through the main door.

Visitors
Visitors are not allowed inside the house. You’re welcome to meet them on the first-floor balcony before 9:00 PM.

No Smoking Indoors
Smoking inside the house is strictly prohibited.
A ₹5,000 fine applies for violations.

Food in the Bedroom
Light snacks and drinks are fine. Please avoid eating full meals in the bedroom to prevent odours and stains.

Food Storage
Kindly avoid storing strong-smelling items (like jackfruit) in the fridge.
Thank you for helping us keep MeowHaus clean, calm, and welcoming.

With warmth,
Team MeowHaus 🐾

Guest access
You’ll have access to:
Common living space
Dining area
First-floor balcony

We’ve also added a compact guest kitchenette on the first-floor balcony with:

Stove
Fridge
Basic utensils
Electric kettle
Suitable for light cooking.


🏋️ Optional gym access
Guests may access a nearby gym (approx. 1 km away) at a special rate of ₹250/day.
Payment is made directly at the gym
Subject to gym timings and rules
Please inform us in advance if interested

During your stay
🤝
Before booking: All communication via the Airbnb app
After booking: We’re available via call/text if needed
During your stay: Feel free to say hello or ask for help, we enjoy hosting respectful, like-minded guests

We also have board games like Catan, uno, project L, chess scrabble etc. if you’d like a relaxed evening in.

Other things to note
PLEASE NOTE:
If you’re allergic to cats or not comfortable around animals, this may not be the right stay for you. Our indoor cat is a part of our home, and you'll likely see him multiple times during your stay. He’s very friendly and spends most of the day sleeping, but his presence is non-negotiable. We appreciate your understanding!

A NOTE ON AMENETIES:
The price you pay is inclusive of a weekly room service, access to drinking water, waste disposal, outdoor parking on our lane and access to laundry services once a week. If you need to use the washing machine, this would incur additional cost of Rs 300 per load.

Discover a side of the city that blends nature with history, perfect for travelers seeking a relaxed and authentic experience.

🌿 Nature & Green Spaces

Hebbal Lake (9 km) – A serene lake ideal for birdwatching and peaceful walks.

Cubbon Park (14 km) – Bangalore’s green heart, perfect for morning strolls and picnics.

Lalbagh Botanical Garden (17 km) – Home to rare plants, century-old trees, and iconic glasshouse.

Avalahalli Forest (25 km) – A hidden gem for short hikes and nature walks.

🎭 Culture & Heritage

Bangalore Palace (11 km) – A glimpse into the city's royal past with beautiful architecture.

Art Galleries & Museums – Explore contemporary and traditional art at NGMA (12 km) or Karnataka Chitrakala Parishath (14 km).

Russell Market & Shivajinagar (8 km) – A historic marketplace buzzing with old Bangalore charm and street food.

Basavanagudi (16 km) – Visit Bull Temple and walk through Gandhi Bazaar for an old-world experience.

🍛 Local Food & Café Culture

South Indian Breakfast Spots – Savor crispy dosas and filter coffee at old-school cafés.

Kammanahalli & Frazer Town – Experience Bangalore’s diverse culinary scene, from traditional Karnataka meals to global flavors.

Indiranagar & Ulsoor – Quaint cafés and heritage homes turned into art spaces.

📍 Whether you're here to unwind in nature, soak in Bangalore’s history, or explore its café culture, Hennur is the perfect base for a slow, meaningful stay.

description:
The Koramangala Nook 102 is a warm and contemporary 1BHK set in vibrant Koramangala. It features a comfortable ensuite bedroom, a cozy living room with a private balcony, and a fully equipped kitchen for effortless daily living. Modern essentials like Wi-Fi, inverter backup, daily housekeeping, and a cook on request ensure a smooth and convenient stay. Step outside to discover some of Bengaluru’s best cafés, restaurants, shopping lanes, and business hubs—all just minutes away.

The space
The apartment is located on the first floor and is easily accessible via both lift and stairs.

🛋 Living Area
A bright and cozy living room with comfortable seating and contemporary décor, designed for relaxing downtime. The space opens directly to a private balcony, giving you a refreshing spot for morning coffee or unwinding in the evening.

🎶 Entertainment
Stay entertained with high-speed Wi-Fi available throughout the apartment—perfect for working, streaming, or browsing during your stay.

🍳 Meals & Kitchen
The fully equipped kitchen includes a 3-burner gas stove, microwave, refrigerator, electric kettle, basic cookware, dinnerware, and cutlery—everything needed to prepare meals and beverages. Guests may also order in through Swiggy, Zomato, or Blinkit for added convenience.

🍽 Dining Area
A functional dining space for 2 sits beside the kitchen, making daily meals comfortable and easy.

🧹 Housekeeping
Housekeeping is done once daily, and linen or towel changes every 3 days. A cook on call request is also available for guests preferring home-style meals (additional charges apply). Laundry and ironing can be done via self-service or external paid services.

🛏 Bedroom
Queen-size bed, spacious wardrobe, attached bathroom, and ample natural light—perfect for a restful stay.

🚻 Bathrooms
Each ensuite bathroom features modern fittings, a walk-in shower, elegant tiling, and essential toiletries—designed to provide a fresh and comfortable experience.

🌿 Balcony
A private balcony to simply taking in the neighborhood’s calm surroundings along with washing machine and drying rack.


🚗 Parking
Parking is common and not reserved. The building has space for only one car, which may be used on a first-come, first-served basis.

🌐 Wi-Fi
High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the home, making it suitable for both work and entertainment. It is subject to network availability and provider limits

🔌 Power Backup
The apartment is supported by inverter backup for essential appliances, ensuring uninterrupted comfort during power cuts.

🛡 Security
Located in a safe, upscale neighborhood, the building offers a private and secure environment with controlled access and reliable surroundings.

Guest access
🔑 Guests have exclusive access to the entire apartment and all its amenities — including the fully equipped kitchen, ensuite bedrooms, and the beautifully furnished living room including a common terrace.

Other things to note
Monthly Stays
We offer generous monthly discounts for long stays (Greater than 27 days). For monthly bookings, utilities have to be borne by the guest (electricity, WIFI, tata sky, laundry of linen & towels). We collect a Rs. 20,000 security deposit at the time of check-in against these.

🛒 Groceries
If you'd like groceries ready before arrival, just send us your list in advance — we’ll take care of it. During your stay, we can also share local delivery contact numbers for your convenience.

⏰ Early Check-in / Late Check-out
Available at an additional charge, subject to apartment availability. Please message us 2 days prior to check if it's possible.

The space
Casa Cottage, our heritage guest house was first built in 1915. The original structure still stands, and we have restored it with all modern comforts while retaining the heritage feel and antique style furnishings. The bungalow is a tranquil sanctuary of calmness right in the heart of Bangalore, with a garden and lots of sits out for our guests to enjoy the open spaces. Breakfast is served in the pergola, and is complimentary for the guests. If you are looking for a unique and different stay in Bangalore, this is the place.

description:
Welcome to your stylish 1RK at Leela Residence, Bhartiya City!

This fully furnished space is perfect for solo travelers or couples.

Enjoy a comfy bed, smart TV, kitchenette, washing machine, and high-speed Wi-Fi.

Located in a premium township community with great security and easy access to Mall, Multiplex, Park, Five Star Hotel, School, Hospital, Manyata Tech Park, airport, and city essentials.

Ideal for long stays!

The space
APARTMENT FEATURES:

This is a fully furnished studio apartment inside a premium township, designed for a comfortable and practical stay. You can walk in and settle down easily without needing to figure things out.

Centralized AC keeps the entire apartment comfortable throughout the day.

High speed WiFi is available, suitable for work, calls, and regular streaming.

A smart TV with a rotatable setup lets you watch from the bed, couch, or dining area.

24x7 hot and cold water is available in the bathroom.

The kitchen is fully equipped with essentials like an oven, dishwasher, electric kettle, and toaster, so you can cook or prepare simple meals if needed.

There is a dedicated workspace, making it easy to work comfortably from the apartment.

You’ll also have good storage space to keep your belongings organized.

Basic essentials like an iron, ironing board, fresh linen, towels, and toiletries are provided.

Regular housekeeping support can be arranged on request.

---

LOCATION HIGHLIGHTS:

The apartment is located inside Bhartiya City township, which is secure, well planned, and easy to navigate.

Manyata Tech Park is very close by, making it ideal for work stays and business travel.

The Leela hotel is right next to the residence, giving you access to premium dining and a luxury environment just a short walk away.

Within the township, you also have access to a mall, multiplex, open spaces, and landscaped areas for walking or relaxing.

The area is suitable for walks, jogging, or cycling within a safe and maintained environment.

The international airport is around 30 minutes away, depending on traffic.

Overall, the location works well for both short stays and longer stays, whether you are here for work or to spend time in the city.

Guest access
Hey… just a quick note about the space 😊

This is a luxury apartment within a premium township, so you’re not just limited to the home itself… you can enjoy the entire ecosystem around it.

You’ll have access to the Leela 5 star hotel area, the garden and park right in front of the building, as well as the mall and multiplex within the township.

If you feel like stepping out a bit, the whole township is great for walks, jogging, running, or even cycling… very safe and well maintained.

And of course, all the amenities shown in the listing photos are fully accessible to you during your stay.

Enjoy the space and make the most of it ✨

Other things to note
This is a self check in apartment inside a residential community, so guests are expected to maintain decorum and respect the surroundings.

Government ID is required for all guests at the time of check in, as per building and security guidelines.

Smoking is not allowed inside the apartment. You may use designated outdoor areas if permitted.

Parties, loud music, or any kind of disturbance are not allowed. This is a quiet and well maintained community.

Check in and check out timings should be followed. Early check in or late check out can be arranged only if available and confirmed in advance.

Daily housekeeping is not included by default but can be arranged on request.

Any damage to the property, furniture, or items will need to be compensated.

Parking is available, but details will be shared before arrival.

For safety and security, certain common areas in the building may have CCTV surveillance.

If you have any specific requirement or question before booking, feel free to check with us… happy to help clarify.

While your room offers privacy and tranquility, please note that this property may be shared with other guests occupying separate rooms. Each guest will have their own private space, but the communal areas such as the kitchen, living room, and terrace are shared spaces for all guests to enjoy.

Step outside and explore the rest of our charming property, which has been meticulously renovated to meet modern standards while retaining its vintage charm. The fully equipped kitchen boasts all the essentials for culinary adventures, including a stove, fridge, oven, toaster, mixer/grinder, and water heater.

Unwind in the cozy living room or dine in style at the 6-seater dining table in the dining hall. Outside, our terrace provides a tranquil spot for laundry duties, complete with a washing machine/Iron (with Ironing board) for your convenience. Dedicated parking zones ensure hassle-free accommodation for your vehicles, whether you arrive by car or bike.

Embrace the serenity of our neighbourhood, characterised by its quiet ambiance and well-educated residents. As a guest, you'll be expected to respect our no-smoking and no-visitors inside the property policy, as well as observe quiet hours after 10:00 PM to ensure a peaceful environment for all.

Explore the vibrant surroundings of Indira Nagar, with an array of dining options and attractions within walking distance. Indulge in culinary delights at Hotel Empire, savour the flavours of Theobroma, or unwind at Cafe Amudam—all within 1500 meters of our doorstep.

Please note that while we do not provide transportation services, our central location offers easy access to public transit, local amenities and delivery services.

As your hosts, we're committed to ensuring your stay exceeds expectations. Whether you're here for business or leisure, we're here to make your experience unforgettable. Book your stay in our single room today and discover the warmth and hospitality of Bangalore's bustling neighborhood.

Guest access
Guests can access the living room, kitchen and terrace.

#Luxurystay #Privateapartment #Petfriendly #2BHKHSRLAYOUT #hsrservicedapartment

House Rules & Property Guidelines

You're staying in a thoughtfully maintained, fully furnished apartment that belongs to someone who takes pride in offering a warm and welcoming space. We request you to treat the home with the same care and respect as you would your own.

- Check-out: Before 10:00 AM

During Your Stay

description:
This Airbnb is in one of Bangalore's most desirable areas, Lavelle Road. This spacious & elegant 2BHK unit is 1200 sqft and is on the 1st floor. The building has a lift. Cars can easily be parked in the basement.

Guests can access the common spaces and the terrace of the building which has a great view of the Bangalore skyline.

Guests can also order groceries, food, etc. on Zepto, Swiggy, Instamart and it will be delivered right to the doorstep.

The space
The 2BHK has a living cum dining area with a 55-inch Smart TV, Sofas, 2 seater dining table set, a sofa bed (if booked for more than 4 people).

The kitchen is fully functional with a two-door fridge, hob, chimney, water purifier, microwave, sink, all basic cookware, utensils, plates, mugs, glasses, etc.

There are two bedrooms each with an attached washroom, a 43 inch Smart TV, a king size bed with a plush orthopaedic mattress, luxurious linens and a balcony overlooking the garden.

The bathroom has premium finishes, a glass partitioned shower, WC, wash basin and all toiletries.

In the room there are two more leather chairs, a work desk, study chair.

The entire house is centrally air conditioned and has high speed wifi.

To know exact location you can search Prestige Ashcroft. Our building is right next to it.

Other things to note
IMPORTANT NOTES:

* 11pm to 7am are strictly quiet hours.
* This is a residential neighbourhood and we cannot have other residents and neighbours disturbed (especially during the night).
*This airbnb may not be suitable for loud music or partying. Casual friends get togethers are fine though and light music is allowed as long as it does not disturb others.

For friends get togethers, parties, etc. (for bachelor groups) a refundable security deposit of ₹5,000 will be applicable. This needs to be paid before check in and will be refunded 2 hrs after checking out after ensuring there are no damages and all house rules are followed.

description:
Spacious 600 square feet Designer 1BHK Suite with Private Balcony | High-Speed fiber optic Wi-Fi & Smart TV with streaming platforms, Work/Dining Desk, 24/7 power backup for uninterrupted work and comfort |Luxe King Bed & Orthopedic Mattress ,wooden wardrobes for storage | fully equipped Kitchenette | Couch Bed in living room , Max.Occupancy 4 | Elevator access, professional housekeeping and access to paid laundry on site for long stays| Located in Central Bangalore | LGBTQIA++ Affirmative

The space
Step into your private sanctuary, one of four fully furnished 1BHK suites. Each spacious 600-square-foot unit is thoughtfully designed to be a comfortable retreat. The decor is inspired by unique Indian themes, offering a distinct and pleasing atmosphere. The suite is filled with natural light and cross-ventilation, with all windows equipped with mosquito nets so you can enjoy the city’s weather freely.

The living and dining space is beautifully designed, with a cozy dining nook that doubles as a comfortable workspace, complete with high-speed Wi-Fi and a Smart TV. The furniture is placed to ensure ample walking space, and its height is convenient for all guests, including senior citizens. The fully equipped kitchenette includes a high-tech water purifier, so you won’t need to purchase bottled water.

In the bedroom, you'll find a luxe king bed with a cushioned headboard and an orthopedic mattress for a restful night's sleep. For your convenience, all bed switches and charging points are placed right next to the bed, and electrical sockets are at a comfortable waist level. The bathroom is equipped with a shaving mirror, hairdryer, and dedicated vanity storage for your toiletries.

You’ll have two sets of curtains for complete light control and privacy. For your peace of mind, the property offers 24/7 power backup, air conditioning, and a washing and drying facility on a paid basis. The owners' private residence is on the upper floors, ensuring personal attention and added security.

Artistic elements to look for in The Himsagar Suite:

* **Sunset Ombré Walls:** The gradient of colors on the walls, moving from sunset warmth to moss green.
* **Original Artwork:** A curated collection of art reflecting mountain and ocean life.
* **Fluid Furniture:** Modern furniture with curved shapes inspired by waves and natural topography.
* **Bespoke Lighting:** Custom-designed lighting fixtures in the dining nook.
* **Scalloped Headboard:** A dramatic, channel-tufted headboard shaped like a seashell.
* **Oceanic Marble-Effect Tiles:** Bathroom tiles designed to replicate the swirling movement of ocean waves.
* **Plant-laced Balcony:** A green oasis with hanging planters and flowering vines.

Guest access
You'll have exclusive and private access to the entire 1BHK suite. Guests also have access to ground floor parking, the plant-filled entry to the main building, and the elevator for your convenience. For all your laundry needs, our caretaker is available to assist you with the paid washing and drying facility. The property is secured by 24-hour security.

Neighborhood
Cooke Town offers a blend of old Bangalore charm with its tree-lined streets and colonial architecture, coupled with excellent connectivity to modern business and shopping hubs. It provides a peaceful residential environment that still feels connected to the city's pulse.

### Getting Around from Cooke Town

Local Transport
Airport (BLR):35-55 mins by cab.
Main Train Station: 30-40 mins by cab/auto.
Main Bus Station:** 30 mins by cab/auto.

Hospitals (within 45 mins)
Fortis Hospital:** ~10 mins
Manipal Hospital:** ~20 mins
HCG Cancer Centre:** ~20 mins
Hosmat Hospital:** ~15 mins

Shopping (within 30 mins)
Lido/One MG Mall:** ~10 mins
Garuda Mall:** ~15 mins
UB City:** ~20 mins
Elements Mall:** ~20 mins

Tourist Spots
Ulsoor Lake:** ~5-10 mins
Bangalore Palace:** ~15-20 mins
Cubbon Park:** ~15-25 mins
Lalbagh Botanical Garden:** ~30-45 mins
Tipu Sultan's Palace:** ~30-40 mins

Cultural & Business
MG Road/Brigade Road:** ~15-20 mins
Indiranagar:** ~20-25 mins
NGMA:** ~20-30 mins
Koramangala:** ~30-40 mins
Electronic City:** 50+ mins

Other things to note
To ensure a comfortable stay for everyone, please be mindful of our house rules. Check-in is at 1:00 PM and check-out is at 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out is subject to availability and an hourly fee. Please note that quiet hours are from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM. For your safety, a valid government ID is required for all guests at check-in. The number of guests must match your reservation, and there are additional charges for extra guests or unregistered visitors staying overnight. Lastly, we kindly request you to water the plants on your balcony and bedroom window.

🌿 Heritage Haven – Cozy 1BHK W/Balcony, WiFi & Free Netflix, Amazon Prime video & Disney+ Hotstar

Welcome to Heritage Haven – HSR, a beautifully curated Mughal-inspired retreat where tradition, art, and comfort come together to create a stay that feels truly special.

The space
Step inside and experience a home designed with love and detail— from the hand-painted peacock murals and intricate palace artwork to the warm wooden textures, soft florals, and a romantic four-poster canopy bed. Every corner reflects the charm of India's royal heritage while offering the ease and warmth of a modern Bangalore home.

🕌 What makes Heritage Haven unique
• Elegant Mughal miniature art and handcrafted decor
• A serene bedroom with a luxurious canopy bed
• Floral & botanical touches that add softness and charm
• A cozy living area featuring a bold royal sofa and ornate wall frames
• A fully equipped modern kitchen for long or short stays
• Soft, warm lighting that brings a peaceful, romantic vibe

🌿 Perfect for

Couples, solo travellers, creatives, weekend explorers, business travellers, and anyone seeking a stay that feels both calming and artistically rich.

Whether you’re sipping chai in the cozy living room, waking up next to blooming florals, or admiring the elegant peacock artwork, Heritage Haven offers an experience that is warm, immersive, and unforgettable.

Amenities You'll Love

• Private Balcony: Your quiet outdoor space to unwind.

• High-Speed Wi-Fi: Reliable internet for all your needs.

• Entertainment: The cozy living area features a large Smart TV where you can stream all your favorite shows and movies using our complimentary accounts for Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, and Disney+ Hotstar.

• Power Backup: Uninterrupted power supply for a hassle-free stay.

• Comfort & Convenience: You can count on a relaxing experience with our reliable 24-hour hot water supply.

• Laundry: A washing machine for your convenience.

• Kitchen Essentials: All basic utensils, cookware, and appliances provided.

• Free Parking: Covered two-wheeler parking available on the premises; open parking for four-wheelers just outside the building.

The location: HSR sector 1

Our apartment is situated in the sought-after Sector 1 of HSR Layout, a peaceful yet well-connected area:

• Dining & Shopping: A short walk to numerous cafes, restaurants & supermarkets, and the HSR BDA complex.

• Business Hubs: Just a 10-15 minute drive to the IT hubs of Bellandur, Ecospace, Ecoworld, and Electronic City.

• Parks: IT Layout Park and the 'ITI Layout Kere' Lake are just a 5-minute walk away, perfect for a morning jog or a relaxing evening stroll.

Whether you're in town for business or leisure, our cozy apartment is the perfect home base for your Bangalore adventures.

Come stay in a home where every detail tells a story —
and feel the comfort of heritage wrapped in modern luxury.

Guest access
Guests have private access to their 1BHK apartment. Additionally, you are welcome to use the building's shared rooftop terrace.

• check-in method: We will provide you with a lockbox code to get the keys upon arrival.

• While the apartment is private, we are available 24/7 via Airbnb chat or phone for any questions or assistance you might need during your stay.

Other things to note
Late Check-Out Policy

1. Standard Check-Out Time
• Check-out time is 10:00 AM sharp unless otherwise agreed in advance.

2. Late Check-Out Requests
• Late check-out is not guaranteed and must be requested at least 24 hours in advance.
• Approval depends on cleaning schedules and incoming bookings.

3. Late Check-Out Fees
• Up to 1 hour late: ₹500
• 1–3 hours late: ₹1,000
• Beyond 3 hours: Charged as an extra night’s stay.

4. Unauthorized Late Check-Out
• Staying past 10:00 AM without approval may result in:
• Additional fees
• Immediate involvement of Airbnb support if needed.

It offers an ensuite bedroom with a private balcony, a cozy living room, and a fully equipped open kitchen. Wi-Fi, inverter backup, daily housekeeping, and a cook on request ensure comfort. Step out to Bengaluru’s best cafés, restaurants, and shopping lanes.

The space
🛋 Living Area
A bright and cozy living room with comfortable seating and contemporary décor, designed for relaxing downtime.

🎶 Entertainment
Stay entertained with high-speed Wi-Fi available throughout the apartment—perfect for working, streaming, or browsing during your stay.

🍳 Meals & Kitchen
The fully equipped kitchen includes a 3-burner gas stove, microwave, refrigerator, electric kettle, basic cookware, dinnerware, and cutlery,everything needed to prepare meals and beverages. Guests may also order in through Swiggy, Zomato, or Blinkit for added convenience.


🧹 Housekeeping
Housekeeping is done once daily, and linen or towel are changed every 3 days. A cook on call request is also available for guests preferring home-style meals (additional charges apply). Laundry and ironing can be done via self-service or external paid services.

🛏 Bedroom
Queen-size bed, spacious wardrobe, attached bathroom, and a private balcony for ample natural light—perfect for a restful stay.

🚻 Bathroom
Each ensuite bathroom features modern fittings, a walk-in shower, elegant tiling, and essential toiletries—designed to provide a fresh and comfortable experience.

🌿 Balcony
A private balcony perfect for simply taking in the neighborhood’s calm surroundings.


🚗 Parking
Parking is common and not reserved. The building has space for only one car, which may be used on a first-come, first-served basis.

🌐 Wi-Fi
High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the home, making it suitable for both work and entertainment. It is subject to network availability and provider limits

🔌 Power Backup
The apartment is supported by inverter backup for essential appliances, ensuring uninterrupted comfort during power cuts.

🛡 Security
Located in a safe, upscale neighborhood, the building offers a private and secure environment with controlled access and reliable surroundings.

Guest access
🔑 Guests have exclusive access to the entire apartment and all its amenities — including the fully equipped kitchen, ensuite bedroom, and the beautifully furnished living room along with a common terrace of the building

Other things to note

If you'd like groceries ready before arrival, just send us your list in advance — we’ll take care of it. During your stay, we can also share local delivery contact numbers for your convenience.

⏰ Early Check-in / Late Check-out
Available at an additional charge, subject to villa availability. Please message us 2 days prior to check if it's possible.

Monthly bookings
We offer generous monthly discounts for long stays(Greater Than 27 Days). For monthly bookings, utilities have to be borne by the guest (electricity, WIFI, tata sky, laundry of linen & towels). We collect a Rs. 20,000 security deposit at the time of check-in against these.

description:
Welcome to 'The K-Town Nest', a premium, spacious & private 1BHK in the heart of Kammanahalli.

Standout Features:
• Private Terrace Garden with outdoor seating
• Stylish Bar Counter & Mood Lighting in all rooms

All Comforts:
• High-speed WiFi (with Power Backup)
• 43” Smart TV & Work Desk
• Full Kitchen, Fridge, Washing Machine
• Wardrobe, Hair Dryer, Iron & Geyser

LOCATION: Just 350m to Kammanahalli Main Rd. Walk to the best cafes, dining & shopping spots in minutes.

Brand New (2025 Built)

The space
Welcome to The K-Town Nest, a thoughtfully designed 1BHK residence that blends modern luxury with the joy of outdoor living. Located just 350 metres from the buzzing Kammanahalli Main Road, this apartment offers a quiet, spacious sanctuary moments away from the city's best culinary and shopping scene.

What makes this space unique?
Unlike standard apartments, The K-Town Nest is designed for lifestyle. Whether you are mixing a drink at your private bar or enjoying the cool Bangalore breeze on your terrace garden, this home is built for relaxation.

Detailed Room-by-Room Tour:

🌿 The Private Terrace Garden
Step out onto your exclusive terrace, featuring a garden strip and comfortable outdoor seating. It is the perfect spot for your morning coffee, yoga, or unwinding with a book in the evening.

🍸 Living & Dining Area (With Bar Counter)
The living space is significantly more spacious than a typical 1BHK.
* The Bar: A chic, dedicated bar counter sets the mood for evening drinks or a casual breakfast.
* Entertainment: Relax on the plush sofa and enjoy your favourite shows on the large Smart TV.
* Mood Lighting: We have installed custom mood lighting here (and in every room!) so you can switch from "bright workspace" to "warm, cozy evening" at the touch of a button.
* Workspace: A dedicated desk and chair make this ideal for digital nomads or business travellers.

🛏️ The Bedroom
A peaceful retreat designed for restful sleep.
* Comfort: Features a comfortable queen-sized bed with fresh, high-quality linens.
* Storage: A spacious wardrobe to keep your belongings organised during long stays.

🍳 The Kitchen
Fully equipped for your convenience. Whether you are reheating leftovers from a nearby restaurant or cooking a full meal, you will find:
* Refrigerator
* Microwave Oven
* Induction stove & cookware
* Purified drinking water

🚿 The Bathroom
Clean, modern, and hygienic, featuring a geyser for 24/7 hot showers. We also provide a hair dryer and a complimentary set of toiletries (shampoo, shower gel, dental kits) to help you pack lighter.

💡 Emergency Lighting
To ensure you're comfortable even during a rare power outage, we've installed emergency LED lights in the living area & washroom. You can switch them on at any time for upto 1-2 hours of backup light.

For your convenience, a fully automatic washing machine is also available for your private use.

📍 The Location Advantage
You are in the heart of Kammanahalli.
* Food: Walk to ample cafes, breweries, and multi-cuisine restaurants within 5 minutes.
* Shopping: High-street brands and boutiques are just around the corner.
* Connectivity: Easy access to the Outer Ring Road and the Airport Road.

Perfect for:
* Couples looking for a romantic getaway (the lighting and terrace are perfect!).
* Solo travellers and professionals needing a spacious, inspiring place to work.
* Foodies wanting to explore Bangalore’s culinary capital.

We have curated every corner of The K-Town Nest to ensure you feel right at home from the moment you step in. We look forward to hosting you!

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire apartment, including the terrace. The property is located on the second floor.

Other things to note
• Long Stays: To make extended stays exceptionally comfortable, we provide a complimentary professional cleaning service every 2 days with fresh linens and towels.

• Parking: Free parking for one car is available on the premises. We provide clear and simple instructions after you book.

• Deliveries: You are welcome to order from food and shopping apps (Zomato, Swiggy, Zepto, Amazon, Flipkart etc.). All deliveries are conveniently allowed right to the apartment door.

description:
This beautiful 5 acre farm including the house is open exclusively to your family, friends and pets too!
Situated close to Bangalore city the property remains quiet and peaceful. The house has one bedroom -one king size bed, a living room with three queen size beds and one sofa-cum bed. The kitchen, fully equipped has a dining area. There is a beautiful swimming pool attached to the house, outdoor rain dance, cards , carom board , spike ball, village style bowling and human-foosball and more.

The space
Grameen Camp is situated very close to Bangalore city , yet very quiet and easily accessible. The entire house is built in traditional Indian village style with a beautiful Jagali ( Portico) outside where you can quietly read a book or simply share laughter and have a good time with your family and friends. The house has one bedroom with two single beds and the large living room has two queen size beds and one sofa-cum bed. The Kitchen is fully equipped with a Gas stove, fridge, microwave, coffee maker, coffee sachets, tea dips and water filter. There is one bathroom with attached western toilet and an extra Indian style toilet.
For people who want to enjoy the outdoor more there is one large tent and one medium tent available with 5 Western toilets and one India toilet and 10 changing rooms.
Apart from the zen atmosphere, if you are looking for some activities to while away your time there is a beautiful swimming pool, rain dance, cards , carom board , spike ball, village style bowling etc.
Enjoy an outdoor PICNIC!!
Picnicking almost feels like a lost art these days… somewhere between deadlines, notifications, and “just one more email.” So here’s our tiny rebellion against busy life — a little outdoor escape just for you.
Please switch your phones to “existential crisis postponed” mode, breathe some fresh air, eat slowly, laugh loudly, and do absolutely nothing important for a while. ☀️🧺

Guest access
You can use the whole five acres with villa and pool exclusively only yours when you book.

Other things to note
You can opt for a half an hour paid tractor ride or rain dance at Rs.1000 with prior booking.

description:
Stand alone studio on villa's terrace with an independent entry. Villa is part of a gated community and the host lives in the floors below, ensuring timely response for anything you need.

Entire terrace floor is for guest's exclusive use. This includes a studio, sit-out deck and green terrace full of seasonal vegetables and flowers. 2/4 wheeler parking is available.

Ideal for two adults or a couple with a young child. Extra guests can be accommodated on a floor mattress (chargeable)

The space
Studio with a sit-out deck and large terrace, accessible through a spiral staircase outside of the host's premises

• Solar water heater and solar panels
• Overlooking a functioning dairy farm
• Hi speed Wi-Fi, inverter back-up, dedicated workspace and AC
• Home-cooked meals at a nominal cost, with prior notice

Well equipped kitchenette with Fridge, microwave, induction cooktop, and electric kettle. Enough to prepare tea, coffee, baby food, or boiled meals. No oil based cooking please

In close proximity, you will find tech parks, universities, hospitals, and cafés.

A serene lake with a km long walking track, just 100m away.

Help yourself to the complimentary tea/coffee in the room.
Plenty of books and games in the room to keep you engaged.

Guest access
The property is surrounded by tall trees and sounds of nature. The large windows provide panoramic views of coconut, eucalyptus, palm, Areca nut and other tall trees.

Guests love to chitchat and spend time in the sit-out deck, surrounded by cool breeze, the rustle of leaves, birds chirping and clean healthy air. You are free to avail the garden below.

The terrace is perfect for barbecues, intimate dinners, or starlit conversations. Grill, coal, and accessories are available on request, at an extra charge.

Other things to note
Designed with sustainability in mind, the architecture blends traditional and modern elements to create a space deeply connected to nature, without sacrificing material comforts. The lower floor walls are built with stone masonry, while the upper floor and the guest space are done in mud blocks.

Taking the sustainability factor a notch up are the solar panels. They facilitate a natural habitat for the fruit plants and the flowering plants aid pollination.

A perfect blend of nature, sustainability, and comfort, we invite you to experience tranquility like never before. Come, stay with us, and let nature embrace you—you’ll love every moment!

A spiral staircase outside of the host's premises takes to the green terrace, where you have the whole floor to yourself! The studio opens up to a sit-out deck with mesmerizing views.

5-minute walk to Sulikunte Bus Stop
Plenty of dining options nearby & delivery via Zomato/Swiggy

Step outside onto the open-to-air balcony or the regular balcony and enjoy the sun!

Retreat to one of the three bedrooms, each with its own attached bathroom for ultimate privacy and comfort. Unwind with your favorite shows on the Smart TV with Netflix access, or simply bask in the opulence of this meticulously designed property.

Conveniently located on road no 12 Banjara Hills, this property offers easy access to the best that Hyderabad has to offer. Whether you're here for business or leisure, this is the perfect home base for your stay. Experience luxury living at its finest, at rates that are simply unbeatable.

Guest access

Guest Identification
All guests are required to share a government-approved photo ID prior to check-in, as per building and local regulations.

Housekeeping
Daily cleaning services are not included during your stay; however, cleaning supplies are provided inside the apartment for your convenience. For longer stays, we offer a complimentary housekeeping service once a week. Daily cleaning can also be arranged upon request at an additional charge.

description:
Stay at Jam Haus, a cosy 1BHK in the heart of the city.

Perfect for three guests, it offers free WiFi and a fully functional kitchen for a comfortable stay.

Centrally located, it provides easy access to both old and new parts of the city. The international airport is 50–60 mins away, and the railway station just 15 mins.

The space
The apartment is located on the ground floor of a residential compound, offering privacy and convenience.

LIVING & DINING

The apartment has a cozy living and dining area, perfect for spending time with family or friends. A smart TV with a free Netflix subscription is available for your entertainment, along with a free WiFi connection.

PATIO

One of the standout features of the apartment is the spacious patio, furnished with a table and chairs—an ideal spot to work, enjoy a cup of coffee, or simply relax in the open air.

BEDROOM

The apartment has a spacious bedroom furnished with a king-size bed and a single bed, making it ideal for families or small groups. The room also includes fresh bedding and linen, a wardrobe, a desk, and an air conditioner to ensure a comfortable stay.

BATHROOM

The bathroom is equipped with a shower and a western-style commode. Running water is available throughout the day, and a geyser ensures you have hot water whenever needed.

KITCHEN

The fully functional kitchen has everything you need to prepare and enjoy a great meal. It includes a fridge, gas hob, microwave, toaster, water purifier, hot water kettle, pressure cooker, mixer grinder, and all the necessary cooking utensils, cutlery, and crockery.

OTHER UTILITIES

For added convenience, the apartment is equipped with a washing machine, ironing table, and a clothes drying stand, all available for guest use.

SAFETY

For your peace of mind, CCTV cameras are installed in common areas for added security.

All in all, this is a fully furnished and functional space where you can unwind and enjoy a comfortable stay, whether you’re here for a short visit or a longer getaway.

Guest access
You’ll have full access to the entire apartment, including the living and dining area, bedroom, bathroom, patio, and kitchen.

Other things to note
• All guests must submit a government-approved photo ID before check-in.

• Cleaning services are not included for stays of less than 7 nights. For bookings of 7 nights or more, a full cleaning of the apartment along with a change of sheets and towels is provided once weekly. Cleaning supplies are also available in the apartment for guests to use during the stay.

description:
Experience comfort and charm at Ostello Isabello ✨a thoughtfully designed stay perfect for business warriors 💼 and leisure dreamers 🌴.

Wake up to fresh air 🌬️ and sunshine ☀️ from your private balcony or large window. Sleep like royalty 👑 on a king bed with a 10” pocket spring mattress (warning: may cause extreme coziness 😴). Sip great coffee ☕ at Isabel Café and enjoy art workshops 🎨.

Located in Hitech City/Madhapur 📍, close to IT hubs and entertainment hotspots 🎥!

The space
Welcome to Ostello Isabello: Less "sterile hotel," more "bakery-scented sanctuary." 🌿☕

At Ostello Isabello, we’ve traded beige hallways and tiny soap bars for a thoughtfully designed space that actually feels like home (if your home was a minimalistic dream in the heart of the city). Whether you’re here to crush a business meeting or just crush a croissant, we’ve got you.

The Sleep & The View
Our 10” king-sized bed is basically a cloud in disguise, designed for the kind of sleep that makes you forget your alarm exists. You’ll wake up to natural light pouring in through the large window and a fresh breeze from your private balcony. Looking out over our neighboring 3-acre park, you’d almost forget you’re minutes away from the Hitec City chaos.

The "No TV" Philosophy (Trust us, it’s a good thing)
You won’t find a TV in any of our rooms. Why? Because we’re old-school romantics who believe in the power of great food and even better conversation. We want you to forge friendships, not just channel-surf. But don't panic: If there’s a massive game or an event the world is talking about, we’ll screen it at Isabel Café or This The Place. It’s way more fun to cheer (or cry) with a crowd and a coffee anyway.

Work from "Home" (But Better)
Need to hop on a Zoom or plan your Hyderabad food tour? Our dedicated workspace comes with a chair that actually likes your back and high-speed WiFi that won’t ghost you in the middle of a pitch.

Guest access
The Culinary & Creative Scene 🎨🍜
Forget scrolling through delivery apps. You’re staying in the middle of a food lover’s paradise. As an Ostello Isabello guest, you’re part of the family—which means 10% off at all our spots:

Here’s What’s Cookin’ (4 buildings away): Think vibrant Asian fusion with a cheeky desi twist. It’s loud, it’s fun, and it’s delicious.

Isabel Café (Downstairs): Our little slice of Barcelona. Fresh sourdough, artisanal coffee, and that "I could sit here all day" vibe.

This The Place (First Floor): A cozy Pahadi escape serving authentic, soul-warming flavors from the mountains. 🏔️

The Social Proof: Our outlets have over 12,000+ reviews with a 4.3+ rating. We aren’t just "hotel food"—we’re where the locals come to eat.

More than just a meal:

Artistic Mornings: Catch one of our weekend art workshops at Isabel Café.


The Common Kitchen: Your Home (Away) Office 🍳
We know that eating out every meal can be a hit to the wallet (and the waistline). We want you to feel at home, so we’ve built a shared, two-station kitchen that’s actually stocked with things you’ll use.

We provide the basics: oil, spices, pans, induction stoves, a microwave, an electric rice cooker, and a mixer. You bring the chef skills.

The "Good Roommate" Guide: To keep the vibes high and the ants away, we have a few simple house rules:

The "Clean Slate" Policy: If you use a pan, please wash it, wipe it, and put it back. Our wonderful housekeepers aren't dishwashers! 🧼

Room Service (The DIY Kind): To keep your room smelling fresh, we keep the cooking and eating to the Rooftop or the Patio. No spicy curries in the sheets, please!

The Return Policy: Please don’t hoard the utensils in your room—they like to stay in the kitchen where they belong.

This facility not only helps you save money on meals but also ensures you have access to fresh, home-cooked food during your travels.

Other things to note
📍 Location: You’re in the Eye of the (Hitech) Storm
We’re strategically hidden right where the action is. Whether you’re here to sign deals, study hard, or just eat your way through Hyderabad, everything is a hop, skip, or a short Uber away.

💼 The Business & Tech Hubs

Raheja Mindspace: 5-min walk (Yes, you can actually roll out of bed and into your meeting).

International Tech Park / Satva Knowledge City: 15-min walk.

Knowledge Park / Dallas Centre / Skyview 10: 10-min drive.

T-Hub / T-Works / Deloitte / Novartis / Qualcomm: 12-min drive.

🎓 The ISB & Academic Orbit

U.S. Visa Application Centre: 5-min walk (Stress-free mornings for your appointment!).

U.S. Consulate General: 20-min drive.

ISB / IIIT / HCU: 15–20 min drive.

🍕 Food, Fun & Retail Therapy

Isabel Café: Downstairs (Follow the smell of coffee).

This The Place (Pahadi Vibes): Ground Floor.

Here’s What’s Cookin’: 2-min walk.

Inorbit Mall / HITEX Exhibition Center: 10–12 min drive.

The "Cool" Neighbors: Red Rhino, Heart Cup, Burma Burma, and Paul are all within a 10-min drive.

🚆 Connectivity & Essentials

Durgam Cheruvu Metro: 5-min walk (City unlocked!).

Airport (RGIA): 35 mins via the ORR.

AIG / Yashoda Hospital: 10-min drive.

📜 The House Rules (The "Don't Be That Guest" Guide)
We’re all about good vibes and mutual respect. To keep the harmony:

Checkout: 11:00 AM sharp. Our cleaning crew is efficient, and the next traveler is just as excited as you were!

Guest Count: Max 2 guests per room. Please book for the right number so we can prep accordingly.

Parties: Private, quiet gatherings are cool. Substance-free is the rule. If you're decorating, keep it on the rooftop and please, no "permanent" reminders on our walls.

The "No Puff" Zone: Strictly NO smoking indoors (Vapes, hookahs, and cigars included). Our plants—and the next guest—appreciate the fresh air.

Housekeeping: We’ll spruce up your space between 12 PM and 2 PM.

Pets: We love them, but our property isn't set up for them. No pets allowed.

The Legal Bit: By booking, you agree that we aren’t responsible for any accidental slips, trips, or misplaced "lucky socks."

🤔 FAQs (The Quick Answers)
Q: Can a friend "hang out" for free?
A: To keep things secure for everyone, all guests staying in the building must be registered on the Airbnb booking. No "sneaky" extra guests, please!

Q: Do I need to pack my own towels?
A: Save that suitcase space! We provide fresh linens, plush pillows, and plenty of clean towels.

Q: Is it family-friendly?
A: Absolutely. We’ve hosted many families who loved having the park next door as their backyard.

Q: Is there a private kitchen?
A: Think of us as a Boutique Hotel setup, not an apartment. While there isn’t a kitchen in your room, we have a fantastic shared kitchen for all guests to use.

Q: How do I find you?
A: We are in the same building as "This The Place"/ "Isabe'" in Madhapur. It’s the ultimate landmark—and the food there is great, too!

description:
Stay at Teak Haus, a spacious 2BHK in the heart of the city.

Perfect for families, friends, business travelers, or remote workers, it offers free WiFi and a Netflix subscription for entertainment and productivity.

Centrally located, it’s easy to explore both old and new parts of the city. The airport is 45–50 minutes away, and the railway station just 10 minutes.

The space
The apartment is located on the fourth floor and is easily accessible via both a staircase and a lift. If you’re driving down, there is parking space available inside the premises and around the apartment.

LIVING & DINING

The spacious living and dining area is perfect for spending quality time with family or friends. A smart TV with a free Netflix subscription is available for all your entertainment needs, along with a free WiFi connection.

BEDROOMS

The apartment has two spacious bedrooms, each furnished with a comfortable double bed, fresh bedding and linen, a wardrobe, and an air conditioner to ensure a comfortable stay. The master bedroom also has an attached balcony with seating, offering a great spot to relax, enjoy the fresh air, or catch a beautiful sunset.

BATHROOMS

There are three bathrooms in the apartment—two attached to bedrooms and one common. Each bathroom is equipped with a shower and a western-style commode. Running water is available throughout the day, and geysers ensure you have hot water whenever you need it.

KITCHEN

The fully functional kitchen is well-equipped with everything you need to prepare and serve a great meal. It includes a fridge, stove, microwave, toaster, water purifier, hot water kettle, rice cooker, mixer grinder, pressure cooker, cooking utensils, and all necessary cutlery and crockery.

UTILITY

For added convenience, the utility area includes a washing machine, an ironing table, and a clothes drying stand, all available for guest use.

SAFETY

Your security is a priority. The apartment complex has 24x7 security personnel, a keypad door entry system at the main lobby, and CCTV cameras in common areas for additional safety.

All in all, this is a fully furnished and fully functional apartment designed for a comfortable and stress-free stay. Whether you’re visiting for a short trip or a longer stay, you’ll find everything you need to relax and enjoy your time here.

Guest access
You’ll have full access to the entire apartment, including the living and dining areas, bedrooms, bathrooms, balcony, kitchen, and utility area.

Other things to note
• All guests must submit a government-approved photo ID before check-in.

• Cleaning services are not included for stays of less than 7 nights. For bookings of 7 nights or more, a full cleaning of the apartment along with a change of sheets and towels is provided once weekly. Cleaning supplies are also available in the apartment for guests to use during the stay.
