Welcome to Marrakesh — a 3,400 sq. ft. 3BHK in the heart of Banjara Hills at Road No. 13. A serene sanctuary where Mediterranean charm meets modern living.

Located on the first floor with just one apartment per level, the home offers enhanced privacy and a exclusive feel. Sunlit interiors feature graceful arches, natural textures and thoughtfully curated furnishings. Ideal for families, business travellers, and long stays, the apartment also includes 24×7 power backup for uninterrupted comfort

The space
Features:
• Chauffeured car service (available at an additional fee):
Upgrade your stay with the option of airport pick-ups and drop-offs as well as convenient city travel and sightseeing, with a professional driver and comfortable vehicles. A thoughtful add-on for those who value ease, flexibility, and a more relaxed experience.
• 24×7 power backup for uninterrupted comfort
• 3,400 sq. ft. spacious residence
• Suitable for families, business travelers, and long stays


Step into Marrakesh, Hyderabad’s one-of-a-kind Mediterranean retreat, where luxury meets effortless comfort. The moment you enter, you’re welcomed by a bright, airy hall bathed in natural light, featuring a striking brick accent wall, a 65” TV, and a versatile sofa that transforms for extra lounging space.

Flowing seamlessly from the living area, the dining space with its graceful eight-seater table sets the perfect tone for shared meals and laughter. The open kitchen invites you to cook, connect, and create memories, with a neatly designed laundry area close at hand for convenience.

Discover three beautifully appointed bedrooms, each offering a private dressing area, ensuite bathroom, and balcony, creating a sense of calm and privacy in every corner.

End your tour at the cozy reading nook, lined with books for every mood, or freshen up in the elegant powder room that completes this thoughtfully crafted home.

With its thoughtful design, luxurious interiors, and tranquil atmosphere, Marrakesh isn’t just a stay — it’s an experience of premium living, unlike anything else in Hyderabad.

This is one of our newest premium apartments in Hyderabad — designed and managed by a Superhost team with hundreds of 5-star reviews across our other listings.

Guest access
Guests have access to the designated parking area and are permitted entry only to the floor assigned for their stay, ensuring privacy and comfort for everyone.

Other things to note
To ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay for everyone, we kindly request your cooperation in following our house rules:

1. Alcohol consumption is not permitted inside the apartment or in the common areas of the building.
2. Smoking is allowed only on the balcony. Smoking of any illegal substances is strictly prohibited.
3. Parties or loud gatherings are not permitted.
4. We kindly ask guests to avoid playing loud music at any time, so we can maintain a peaceful environment for all residents.

Guest Identification
All guests are required to share a government-approved photo ID prior to check-in, as per building and local regulations.

Housekeeping
Daily cleaning services are not included during your stay; however, cleaning supplies are provided inside the apartment for your convenience. For longer stays, we offer a complimentary housekeeping service once every five days. Daily cleaning can also be arranged upon request at an additional charge.

description:
Enjoy total privacy in our newly built penthouse. The highlight? A private elevator that opens directly into your spacious hall—no shared stairs. Relax on the cozy open-air terrace with sunset views.
Perfect for medical travelers, tourists professionals, and families
​📍 Walk to: Humanity, Premier & Olive Hospitals.
🚗 Secure Parking included. ( Suvs can be parked outside)
✈️ 30 mins to Airport/Hitech City.
🏠 Host family in same building for support, while you enjoy 100% top-floor privacy.

The space
Experience total privacy in our newly built penthouse. The highlight of your stay is the private elevator that opens directly into your spacious hall—no shared stairs or hallways. Whether you are a professional needing a quiet workspace, a family seeking a "home-like" feel, or a traveler prioritizing security, this sanctuary is designed for you.

​Why Guests Love Casa Lune:
​True Privacy: Exclusive top-floor access with a secure electronic lift door.

​Outdoor Living: Relax on our cozy open-air terrace, perfect for morning coffee or sunset views.

​Peace of Mind: Secure, dedicated car parking is included on-site.

​Host Support: Our family lives on the lower floors—we’re here if you need us, but we respect your 100% privacy.

Guest access
You will have full, exclusive access to the entire top-floor penthouse.

​The Private Elevator: For your comfort and privacy, a private elevator opens directly into your penthouse hall. It is secured with an electronic door, ensuring you never have to share space with other floors.

​The Stairs: You also have access to the internal staircase at any time. This provides a secondary way to reach the ground floor and parking area.

​Parking: Guests have a dedicated, secure car parking spot on the ground floor of the premises."

Other things to note
​"To ensure you have a seamless stay, please note the following:

​Power & Connectivity: Hyderabad have rare power fluctuations We have [Inverter/Generator] backup to ensure that essential lights, fans, and the high-speed Wi-Fi remain functional at all times.

​Medical Travel: We are situated in a quiet residential pocket, yet we are a short 5-10 minute walk to Humanity, Premier, and Olive Hospitals. If you are visiting for medical reasons, please let us know if you need help with local pharmacy locations.

​Climate Control: The penthouse is newly built with great ventilation. We provide high-quality AC in room for your comfort; we kindly ask that you turn it off when stepping out to help us remain eco-friendly.

​The Terrace: As this is a peaceful residential area, we welcome you to enjoy the terrace but kindly ask for quiet hours after 10:00 PM to respect the neighborhood.

​Transport: We recommend using Uber or Ola for city travel. We have a dedicated spot for your driver to wait comfortably during pickups."

description:
Stay at Pop Haus, a spacious 3BHK in the heart of the city.

Perfect for families, friends, business travelers, or remote workers, it offers free WiFi and a Netflix subscription for entertainment and productivity.

Centrally located, it’s easy to explore both old and new parts of the city. The airport is 45–50 minutes away, and the railway station just 10 minutes.

The space
The apartment is located on the second floor and is easily accessible via both a staircase and a lift. If you’re driving down, there is parking space available inside the premises and around the apartment.

LIVING & DINING

The spacious living and dining area is perfect for spending quality time with family or friends. A smart TV with a free Netflix subscription is available for all your entertainment needs, along with a free WiFi connection.

BEDROOMS

The apartment has three spacious bedrooms, each furnished with a comfortable double bed, fresh bedding and linen, a wardrobe, and an air conditioner to ensure a comfortable stay. The master bedroom also has an attached balcony with seating, offering a great spot to relax, enjoy the fresh air, or catch a beautiful sunset.

BATHROOMS

There are three bathrooms in the apartment—two attached to bedrooms and one common. Each bathroom is equipped with a shower and a western-style commode. Running water is available throughout the day, and geysers ensure you have hot water whenever you need it.

KITCHEN

The fully functional kitchen is well-equipped with everything you need to prepare and serve a great meal. It includes a fridge, stove, microwave, toaster, water purifier, hot water kettle, rice cooker, mixer grinder, pressure cooker, cooking utensils, and all necessary cutlery and crockery.

UTILITY

For added convenience, the utility area includes a washing machine, an ironing table, and a clothes drying stand, all available for guest use.

SAFETY

Your security is a priority. The apartment complex has 24x7 security personnel, a keypad door entry system at the main lobby, and CCTV cameras in common areas for additional safety.

All in all, this is a fully furnished and fully functional apartment designed for a comfortable and stress-free stay. Whether you’re visiting for a short trip or a longer stay, you’ll find everything you need to relax and enjoy your time here.

Guest access
You’ll have full access to the entire apartment, including the living and dining areas, bedrooms, bathrooms, balcony, kitchen, and utility area.

Other things to note
• All guests must submit a government-approved photo ID before check-in.

• Cleaning services are not included for stays of less than 7 nights. For bookings of 7 nights or more, a full cleaning of the apartment along with a change of sheets and towels is provided once weekly. Cleaning supplies are also available in the apartment for guests to use during the stay.

description:
Experience a private 3400 sq. ft. luxury 3BHK in the heart of Banjara Hills at Road no 13, offering complete floor privacy and refined Victorian elegance.

Designed with timeless interiors, warm natural light, and carefully curated details, the space offers a calm and elevated stay for families and business travelers. Enjoy expansive living areas, quiet comfort, and uninterrupted convenience with 24×7 power backup.

The space
Features:

• 24×7 power backup for uninterrupted comfort.
• 3,400 sq. ft. bright, airy residence with flowing spaces
• Victorian charm paired with elegant furnishings and handcrafted details
• Sunlit interiors with thoughtfully designed corners for relaxation and reflection
• A calm, unhurried atmosphere ideal for quiet mornings and slow moments
• Chauffeured car service (available at an additional fee):
Upgrade your stay with the option of airport pick-ups and drop-offs as well as convenient city travel and sightseeing, with a professional driver and comfortable vehicles. A thoughtful add-on for those who value ease, flexibility, and a more relaxed experience.

Velvet drapery frames sunlight spilling across a spacious hall, illuminating a luxurious leather sofa. The grand eight-seater dining table stands ready for evenings of laughter and quiet conversation, while the open kitchen gleams with contemporary ease. Three bedrooms, each with its own balcony, dressing room, and ensuite bathroom, offer private retreats, and a tucked-away reading nook invites hours lost in the pages of a cherished book. An outdoor laundry discreetly serves the kitchen, and with the apartment occupying an entire floor, every space exudes calm, elegance, and exclusivity.


THE EXPERIENCE
Stepping into The Duke feels like crossing a velvet threshold into another world. Sunlight spills across carved wood, velvet drapes whisper against antique glass, and the air hums with quiet grandeur, dancing with the scent of polished mahogany and possibility. Every corner tells a story; every texture invites you closer.

A 3400 sq.ft. ode to Victorian refinement, The Duke is more than a residence, it’s a reverie. High ceilings crown chandeliers that shimmer like captured rain, while handpicked period furniture mingles with the grace of modern comfort. The living room unfolds like a scene from an English novel, where evenings stretch long and conversations linger by candlelight.

You might find yourself sipping tea by the window as the city hums softly below, or losing track of time in the hush of the library corner. Every detail, from the velvet upholstery to the marble touchpoints, is designed to envelop you in warmth, intimacy, and quiet magnificence.

Here, luxury isn’t loud — it’s felt. Staying at The Duke is less a visit and more a return — to beauty, to stillness, to a forgotten kind of grace. Step inside, and let the century turn just for you.

This is one of our newest premium apartments in Hyderabad — designed and managed by a Superhost team with hundreds of 5-star reviews across our other listings.

Guest access
Guests have access to the designated parking area and are permitted entry only to the floor assigned for their stay, ensuring privacy and comfort for everyone.

Other things to note
To ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay for everyone, we kindly request your cooperation in following our house rules:

1. Alcohol consumption is not permitted inside the apartment or in the common areas of the building.
2. Smoking is allowed only on the balcony. Smoking of any illegal substances is strictly prohibited.
3. Parties or loud gatherings are not permitted.
4. We kindly ask guests to avoid playing loud music at any time, so we can maintain a peaceful environment for all residents.

Guest Identification
All guests are required to share a government-approved photo ID prior to check-in, as per building and local regulations.

Housekeeping
Daily cleaning services are not included during your stay; however, cleaning supplies are provided inside the apartment for your convenience. For longer stays, we offer a complimentary housekeeping service once every five days. Daily cleaning can also be arranged upon request at an additional charge.

Property Description

Welcome to your urban sanctuary in the heart of Hyderabad. This stunning luxury penthouse is designed for private discerning travelers who demand sophistication, comfort, and convenience. Located in the vibrant HiTec City Madhapur neighborhood—the pulse of Hyderabad’s IT hub—this property offers the perfect blend of cosmopolitan energy and peaceful living.

Perfect for professionals, couples, families, and extended-stay guests, this contemporary home features two spacious bedrooms, 2.5 modern bathrooms, and an open living area flooded with natural light. Whether you’re here for business, leisure, or an extended assignment, this penthouse provides everything you need for a comfortable and memorable stay.

What Makes This Space Special
• Modern, sophisticated interiors with contemporary design and elegant lighting
• Private terrace with stunning city skyline views—your own slice of peace above the city
• Two generously sized bedrooms with premium bedding and AC in all rooms
• Fully equipped kitchen
• High-speed Wi-Fi perfect for remote work and video calls

Your Neighborhood
Located in Ayyappa Society, Madhapur—Hyderabad’s premier IT and business district. This is where innovation meets urban comfort. You’re literally surrounded by the city's largest tech companies (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, TCS, Infosys, Wipro), yet nestled in a calm, green, community-oriented residential pocket.

Work & Business
• Epicenter for IT professionals—all major tech parks and MNC campuses within 5-15 minutes

• Ultra-fast internet connectivity (fiber-based broadband)

description:
Welcome to Ostello Isabello — where the WiFi’s fast ⚡, the vibes are faster 🎶, and the smell of fresh coffee ☕ wafting in from Isabel Café hits harder than your alarm ⏰. Soft lighting? Check ✅. Balcony for dramatic stares into the distance? Double check 🧘‍♂️🌇. Whether you're here to hustle 💻 or just eat your way through the city 🍜🍛, we've got your back. With cozy corners 🛋️, chill common spaces ✨, and a community of curious wanderers 🌍, this is where comfort meets character 💫!

The space
**Welcome to Ostello Isabello, where your stay is more than just a place to sleep—it’s an experience.** This thoughtfully designed twin-bed room is perfect for business and leisure travelers looking for a cozy, comfortable, and community-driven retreat.

Step into a well-lit space featuring two plush 10" pocket spring mattresses, ensuring restful sleep after a long day of work or exploration. The room opens up to a private balcony, offering a peaceful spot to enjoy a cup of coffee or simply unwind in the fresh air.

For digital nomads and business travelers, a dedicated work area with a comfortable chair provides a quiet space to stay productive. With high-speed WiFi, planning your Hyderabad adventures or catching up on work is seamless.

At Ostello Isabello, we believe in creating meaningful experiences beyond just a stay. That’s why none of our rooms have TVs—encouraging guests to bond over food, engage in conversations, and make new friends. If there’s a big game or an exciting event, you won’t miss out—we’ll screen it at Isabel Café or This The Place, turning it into a shared experience for all to enjoy!


### This thoughtfully designed space offers:
✅ Two plush 10” pocket spring twin beds for a restful night’s sleep.
✅ A dedicated work area with a comfortable chair for business or leisure use.
✅ A private balcony, perfect for unwinding with a drink or morning coffee.
✅ Modern bathroom amenities for a refreshing stay.
✅ Accommodates up to 2 guests, ideal for solo travelers, colleagues, or friends.

Single Occupancy: If you book for single occupancy, this is not a shared room. The second bed will remain unbedded, and the entire space is exclusively yours for a comfortable and private stay.

To accommodate additional guests, please get in touch with us—we’d be happy to discuss the possibilities!

Heads up! We’re not a hotel—we’re your cozy, bakery-scented Airbnb-style escape. And while we’ve got charm in abundance, our power backup is a little old-school. In case of a power cut, you'll still have the fan whirring and essential lights glowing—enough to keep you cool and not bump into furniture. Romantic candlelit vibes? Optional.

Book now and experience the charm of Ostello Isabello!

Guest access
Culinary & Creative Experiences

Indulge in a diverse culinary experience right at your doorstep. As an Ostello Isabello guest, you get 10% off across all our outlets:

Here's What’s Cookin’ (2 buildings away) – A vibrant hotspot serving an exciting fusion of Asian cuisines with a desi twist.

Isabel Café (Downstairs) – A charming bakery bringing a slice of Barcelona to Hyderabad, offering fresh bakes and artisanal coffee.

This The Place (First Floor) – A cozy Pahadi restaurant serving authentic flavors from the mountains.

These outlets boast over 12,000+ reviews with an impressive 4.3+ rating, ensuring you enjoy some of the best-rated food in town.

Beyond food, immerse yourself in creativity! On weekends, immerse yourself in art workshops at Isabel Café, where creativity flows as freely as our coffee. In the evenings, unwind with live music performances at This The Place, setting the perfect ambiance for a relaxed night.

Common Kitchen – A Home Away from Home

Traveling involves significant expenses for food and accommodation. At Ostello Isabello, we encourage you to eat healthy and feel at home by providing a fully equipped common kitchen for all our guests, including dormitory residents.

Our Ostello Isabello style shared two station kitchen is stocked with essentials such as oil, spices, pans, vessels, induction stoves, a microwave, a mixer, an electric rice cooker, a fridge, and a water dispenser. While we provide these conveniences, we request all guests to maintain cleanliness and respect shared spaces.

Vessels used should be wiped and replaced after use.

Carrying utensils into rooms is not allowed.

All cooked food must be consumed either on the rooftop or downstairs in the patio.

Dishes should be washed and returned to their appropriate places.

This facility not only helps you save money on meals but also ensures you have access to fresh, home-cooked food during your travels.

House Rules
To ensure a smooth and enjoyable stay, we kindly request all guests to follow these guidelines:


Checkout Time: 11:00 AM sharp. Please check out on time to allow preparation for the next guest.

Guest Capacity: The room accommodates up to Max of 3 guests only. Ensure you book for the correct number of guests. To accommodate additional guests, please get in touch with us—we’d be happy to discuss the possibilities!

Private Gatherings: Allowed, but must be quiet and substance/ drug-free. Decorations should be placed only in the rooftop area and must not damage property.

Smoking: Absolutely NOT allowed inside (including e-cigarettes, hookah, cigars).

Cleaning & Pets:
Daily housekeeping is provided between 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM.
No pets allowed.

Liability Disclaimer: By booking, you acknowledge that the owner is not responsible for accidents, injuries, or loss of belongings.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Can I invite friends to stay for a few hours for free?
No. Any additional guests must be added to your booking on Airbnb.

Do you provide daily maid service?
Yes! Housekeeping staff will clean the room.

Should I bring my own linens, towels, and pillowcases?
No need! We provide fresh linens, pillows, and comforters, all washed before your visit, along with plenty of towels.

Is the room child-friendly?
Yes! Many families have stayed with us and found it to be the perfect family getaway.

Where exactly is the room located?
We are located in Madhapur, Hyderabad, near Raheja Mindspace, with excellent connectivity to metro stations, business hubs, and entertainment spots. "This The Place" (Pahadi Cuisine) is our landmark, and we are in the same building.

Is there a private kitchen in the room?
No, this is a hotel setup and not an apartment. There is a single common kitchen shared by all rooms, where guests can prepare their food if needed.

What if I book a twin room for a single person?
If you book a twin room for just one person, the room is entirely absolutely yours. However, the second bed and mattress will remain in the room, but it will not be made.

We look forward to hosting you! Let us know if you need recommendations during your stay. 😊

Stay at Zen Haus, a modern 2BHK in the heart of the city.

Perfect for families, business travelers, or those seeking a change of space while working from home, it offers free WiFi and a Netflix subscription.

The space
The apartment is located on the first floor and is easily accessible via both a staircase and a lift. If you’re driving down, there is parking space available inside the premises and around the apartment.

LIVING & DINING

The spacious living and dining area is perfect for spending quality time with family or friends. A smart TV with a free Netflix subscription is available for all your entertainment needs, along with a free WiFi connection. The dining area also opens up to a balcony, providing a refreshing space to relax and enjoy the fresh air.

BEDROOMS

The apartment has two spacious bedrooms, each furnished with a comfortable double bed, fresh bedding and linen, a wardrobe, and an air conditioner to ensure a comfortable stay.

BATHROOMS

description:

--
This newly renovated 3 Bedroom apartment has everything you need. Here are some of the cool features of our Airbnb that our guests absolutely love:

1. **Air Conditioning + Inverter Power Back-Up**
Our Airbnb is equipped with four powerful ACs in all bedrooms and the living room. You'll stay cool and comfortable, even on the hottest days with Inverter Power Back-up.

2. **Modern Ambience**
There are many aesthetic spots around the house where you can click that perfect picture to capture your group's memories. By switching between white and golden lighting you can create a special atmosphere in the house.

3. **Comfortable Beds with Fresh Bedsheets**
There are 3 bedrooms with 3 Beds that can sleep upto 6 guests. The Living Room contains 4 Sofa/Beds that can be converted into a Single-Bed or a King-Size-Floor-Mattresses and 1 single bed and can sleep 9 more guests. One set of fresh pillows, bedsheets and blankets will be provided to the extra guests.

Queen Beds - 3
Sofa/Beds - 4
Single matress-1

4. **Geysers in All Bathrooms**
We have 2 attached bathrooms and 1 common bathroom, all of which are equipped with Fast Heat Geysers and high water pressure for your comfort.

5. **High-Speed Wifi**
Stay connected with our high-speed wifi, which offers download speeds of up to 174mbps. You can connect upto 10 devices to wifi and stream movies, work from home, or browse the web with ease.

6. **Entertainment Systems**
Our entertainment system includes a 55' 4K Smart TV with Airtel HD DTH channels & all OTT apps, perfect for movie nights with your loved ones.

7. **Fully Equipped Kitchen**
You'll love the flexibility of being able to order in, go out or stay in to cook. We stock our kitchen with pots, pans, plates, glassware, utensils along with essential ingredients/spices. If you're unsure about what we might have, ask us. The kitchen has an Induction stove, mixer-grinder, microwave oven, kettle, and air fryer which will give you the ability to whip up a beautiful breakfast, brunch or dinner.

8. **RO Water Purifier**
Safe drinking water is important, which is why we provide an RO water purifier.

9. **Stocked Fridge**
We provide a 3-door fridge stocked with 4 water bottles and ice trays. You can keep your drinks cool and fresh during your stay.

10. **Daily Maid Cleaning and Dishwashing**
Our daily maid ensures that your apartment is clean and tidy every day. We also offer dishwashing services, so you don't have to worry about cleaning up after your meals. Daily Home cleaning and dish-washing will be done between 11:00am - 1:00pm

11. **Washing Machine**
We have a washing machine available guests, so you can pack light and have fresh clothes throughout your stay. You may ask the Maid to wash your laundry too.

12. **Close to City's Top Attractions and Landmarks**
Although we're located in the heart of the city, we're in a peaceful neighbourhood. Within 5 kms you will find amazing restaurants, Malls, Pubs and street food joints. For reference
- Forum/Nexus Mall (Supermarket, Liquor Store, Starbucks, Medical Shop) - 3 mins away
- JNTU Metro Station(Local Restaurants, Police Station, Shopping Zone) - 7 mins away
- Hi-Tech City (Hitex Convention, Cyber Towers, Shilparamam) - 5 mins away
- Jubilee Hills (Popular Pubs, Coffee Shops, upscale Fine Dining) - 20 mins away
- Gachibowli (Most IT Offices, Durgam Cheruvu Cable Bridge, Top Restaurants) - 15 mins away
- Airport - 35 mins away


13. **Ample Parking for Cars and Bikes**
Our Airbnb offers 1 ground floor parking and street parking for up to 8-10 cars and bikes.

Click on the Amenities section to see the Full List.

--------------------------
IMPORTANT HOUSE RULES:
We have a few requests for you. Adhering to these requests will not only help avoid additional charges & damages, but will also ensure your stay is comfortable.


1. We kindly ask all our guests to adhere to the checkout time of 11:00 AM. Late checkouts can cause inconvenience to the next guest who will be checking in next, and we want everyone to have the same great experience that you’ve enjoyed. To ensure this smooth transition, please be aware that any late checkouts will incur a fine of 10,000 INR. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

2. If you booked the space for 'x' guests, only 'x' guests are permitted inside the house at any time. Please choose the correct number of guests while making the booking. The Base Price is applicable for upto 6 guests only. For every additional guest you select, Rs. 750 will be added to the Base Price.

3. There are 3 bedrooms with 3 Beds that can sleep upto 6 guests. The Living Room contains 4 Sofa/Beds that can be converted into a Single-Bed or a King-Size-Floor-Mattresses and 1 single bed can sleep 9 more guests. One set of fresh pillows, bedsheets and blankets will be provided to the extra guests.

Our space can accommodate up to 15 guests only. More extra beds cannot be provided.

3. Private get-togethers are allowed as long as they’re not loud and no drugs are involved. Decoration, if necessary, must be done without permanent damage. Refrain from using stickers, double-sided tapes, nails etc; that can permanently damage the property.

4. Please do not use Confetti/Snow-Spray or play Cake Smash inside the house. Kindly remove all decorations & clean-up before checking-out. If you're looking to host a party here, please read all the House Rules very carefully to avoid additional Cleaning Fee.

5. No smoking allowed inside the property (including Hookah, e-cigarettes, cigars etc.) Smoking is ONLY allowed in the 2 Balcony Areas. If found smoking indoors additional fine of 10,000/- will be charged.

6. Please keep the property clean and tidy. Daily Home cleaning and dish-washing will be done between 11:00am - 1:00pm by our Maid.

7. Pets not allowed, even if they're adorably cute :) Additional fee of 10,000₹ will be charged for bringing a pet without permission.

7. By booking this Airbnb, you release the owner of the property from any and all liability for -
a. unintentional exposure of COVID-19
b. any harm caused due to accidents at the property.
c. any illicit acts committed by the guests at the property.
d. any loss or damage of guests personal belongings

Please follow House Rules to make it easier for future guests to enjoy the same quality space you will be enjoying!

Guest access
You can access Entire 2nd Floor of this Independent Building using Lift or Stairs.

Restricted Areas NO ENTRY to:
1. 1st, 3rd, 4th, 5th & 6th Floors
2. Inverter Room

Other things to note
We are so excited to have you stay with us and look forward to making your stay as comfortable and enjoyable as possible.

Frequently Asked Questions:

Do you have Daily Maid Service + Housekeeping?
Yes! Housekeeping staff will visit everyday between 11:00am - 1:00pm to refresh the house, clean dishes, set up beds, mop floors etc;

Can I invite my friends to stay for a few hours for free?
Sorry, you may not. You will need to pay extra 750/- fee for every additional guest even if they stay for a few hours. i.e. if you only booked the space for 'x' guests, only 'x' guests are permitted inside the house at any time.

Can I reach you on Phone?
Airbnb doesn't allow to share our number until after the booking. Please feel free to contact me on Chat. My co-host and I try to respond quickly and assist you with anything.

Should I bring linens, towels, and pillowcases?
We understand nobody wants to travel with their sheets and pillowcases. We provide linens, pillows & comforter for each bed. We wash every piece of bedding before your visit. We'll also make sure there's plenty of towels.

Is the apartment a good place for children?
Yes! We've had several families stay with us, and they've found it perfect for a family getaway.

Where are you Located?
This space is in Kukatpally - KPHB 7th Phase near Indu Township.

description:
Welcome to our Premium 3-Bedroom Home Stay in Mithra Hills, Miyapur

Experience the comfort of a spacious home in a peaceful, family-friendly residential colony. Conveniently located in Mithra Hills, Miyapur, with easy access to Kukatpally, Hitec City, and Hyderabad's major IT hubs, this thoughtfully designed 2,000 sq. ft. 3BHK apartment is ideal for business travelers, families, medical visitors, and extended stays.

The space
Located in a safe, quiet, and family-oriented residential neighborhood, the apartment offers a peaceful environment where guests can relax and unwind while remaining conveniently connected to Hyderabad's major IT hubs, business districts, leading hospitals, shopping destinations, and restaurants.

The apartment comfortably accommodates up to 6 guests, with the option to host up to 8 guests using additional mattresses, making it suitable for families, business travelers, medical visitors, and group stays.

All three bedrooms are equipped with air conditioning to ensure year-round comfort, including during Hyderabad's warmer months. The home is thoughtfully appointed with comfortable beds, clean and well-maintained bathrooms, spacious wardrobes, dedicated seating areas, and ample power outlets, creating a practical and welcoming space for both leisure travelers and remote-working professionals.

Please respect the quiet residential atmosphere.

description:
At Ostello Isabello in Madhapur, Hyderabad, we blend cozy comfort with the charm of your favorite bakery ☕.

Wake up to the aroma of freshly brewed coffee from Isabel Café. Enjoy 🌳 park views from your private balcony, stretch out on a plush 10" pocket spring king-sized bed 🛏️, and pretend to work at your workspace 💻.

We’ve got all the modern amenities you need, with that cozy, home-away-from-home vibe you love from Airbnb and none of the annoying hotel vibes 🙌 !!!

The space
🌟Welcome to Ostello Isabello 🌟
Where your stay is more than just a place to crash — it’s a vibe, a memory, and yes, it smells like fresh croissants 🥐✨

This thoughtfully designed room is perfect for both business 🧑‍💻 and leisure 🧳 travelers, blending cozy comfort with everyday convenience.

🌳 Wake up to park views from your private balcony ☕ or the large window 🌅, letting in plenty of natural light and that sweet morning breeze 🍃.
🛏️ You’ll sleep like royalty on a plush 10" pocket spring king-sized mattress — it’s basically a cloud with better lumbar support 😴☁️.
Soft lighting and calm, minimalistic interiors make the room super cozy 🕯️💛.

🚨 No TVs Alert! 🚨
That’s right — we don’t have TVs in our rooms 📺❌ (don’t panic).
Why? Because we believe the best stories aren’t streamed — they’re made 💬🎉.
This is a place to slow down, connect over great food 🍲, sip on freshly brewed coffee ☕, chat with fellow travelers 🧳, and maybe even rediscover the ancient art of reading a book 📖 (gasp!).

But hey, if there’s a big cricket match 🏏, a crazy football final ⚽, we screen it live at Isabel Café or This The Place — because screaming at a screen together is always more fun than doing it alone in a room 😄🎥🍕 — because shared victories just hit different! 🎉👏

🧑‍💻 Work-Friendly, Chill-Ready
For digital nomads and work warriors, we’ve got a dedicated work desk 🪑 and rocket-fast WiFi 🚀 so you can meet deadlines and still have time to chase sunsets 🌇.

📍 Perfect Location
We’re in the heart of Madhapur 🏙️, minutes from IT hubs 💼, food streets 🍛, Durgam Cheruvu Lake 🌅, and the metro 🚉. Whether you’re working, exploring, or snacking — you’re covered.

🌳 Green Views & Fresh Air
Our space overlooks a peaceful 3-acre park — great for morning walks 🚶‍♀️, lazy evening strolls 🌙, or simply zoning out on your balcony with some good tunes 🎧.

✅ In Your Room:
🛏️ Plush 10" pocket spring king-sized mattress = dreamland

🪑 Comfy desk & chair for work (or intense journaling)

🌳 Private balcony with calming park views

🌅 Large window for light, breeze, and stories

🚿 Modern bathroom with essentials

👥 Great for solo travelers or couples (max 2 guests)

Want to bring an extra guest? Let’s chat — we’ll figure it out! 📞😊

⚡ Quick FYI: We’re Quirky, Not Corporate
We’re not a hotel — we’re your cozy, bakery-scented Airbnb-style hideaway 🥐☕.
Our power backup is classic — your fan 🌀 and lights 💡 will keep going even if the city’s power takes a nap.
Candlelight vibes? Totally optional (but kinda cute) 🕯️😉

📅 Book now and join the Ostello Isabello tribe — where there’s good coffee, comfy beds, zero TVs, and 100% good vibes 🎉✨

Guest access
🍽️ Culinary & Creative Experiences 🎨🎶
Indulge in a flavor-packed adventure right at your doorstep! As a guest at Ostello Isabello 🏡, you get 10% off across all our outlets and these delicious deals are just for you! 😋🎉

🍜 Here’s What’s Cookin’ (2 buildings away) – A vibrant hotspot serving an exciting fusion of Asian cuisines with a desi twist. Your taste buds are not ready! 🔥🥢

🥐 Isabel Café (Downstairs) – A charming bakery bringing a slice of Barcelona to Hyderabad. Fresh bakes, artisanal coffee, and the kind of croissants that make mornings worth waking up for. ☕🍰

🥘 This The Place (First Floor) – A cozy Pahadi restaurant serving authentic mountain flavors. Feels like a warm hug from the hills. ⛰️🍲

📈 Together, these spots have racked up 12,000+ reviews with an impressive 4.3+ rating. Basically, your tummy is in very safe hands. 🍽️✨

🎨✨ Beyond Food, Let’s Get Creative!
On weekends, dive into art workshops at Isabel Café, where creativity flows as freely as our coffee ☕🎨 (and trust us, the coffee flows pretty fast).

🎶 In the weekends, unwind with live music performances at This The Place. Great food, soulful music, and maybe a little dance? Totally allowed! 💃🎤

🍳 Common Kitchen – Your Home Away from Home 🏠
Travel can burn a hole in your pocket 💸; food and stays are no joke! So at Ostello Isabello, we help you eat healthy, feel at home, and save big with our fully equipped common kitchen (yes, dorm guests too! 🎒💛).

Our Ostello Isabello-style shared two-station kitchen includes:
🫙 Oil & spices (because bland is banned)
🍳 Pans, vessels, induction stoves
🎛️ Microwave, mixer, electric rice cooker
🧊 Fridge & water dispenser

💡 Kitchen Rules (because we love you but also love cleanliness):
✅ Wipe & return vessels after use (they miss their shelf homes)
❌ No utensils in rooms (they're shy and might get lost)
🍽️ All meals should be enjoyed on the rooftop 🌇 or patio downstairs 🌿 — room service? Nope, patio service!
🧼 Dishes should be washed and kept back (our ammas are sweet, but the kitchen’s a self-serve zone) 💪

This space not only saves you money 💰 but also means you can enjoy fresh, home-cooked goodness even when you’re far from home 🍲❤️.

Other things to note
*************************************************
Nearby Landmarks & Distances


IT & Business Hubs:
Raheja Mindspace - 5 min walk
International Tech Park Hyderabad - 15 min Walk
Satva Knowledge City - 15 min walk
Satva Knowledge Park- 10 min drive
Dallas Centre - 10 min drive
Skyview 10 - 10 min drive
T-Hub - 12 min drive
T-Works - 12 min drive

Novartis - 10 min drive
Qualcomm - 10 min drive


Entertainment & Malls:
HITEX / Novotel/ HICC Exhibition Center & Shilparamam - 10 min drive
Inorbit Mall - 12 min drive
AMB/ Forum Mall Kukatpally - 15 min drive


Food & Cafes:
Isabel Café - Downstairs
This The Place (Northeastern Cuisine) - Ground Floor
Here’s What’s Cookin' (Korean Street Food) - 2 min walk
Mindspace Social - 10 min walk
Red Rhino, Heart Cup Coffee, Burma Burma, Paul, Postcard, Kembara, Tevar - 10 min drive


5 Star Properties:
Westin - 5 mins walk
ITC Kohenur - 5 mins drive
Novotel - 5 mins drive
Trident - 5 mins drive


Hospitals:
AIG Hospital - 10 min drive
Yashoda Hospital - 10 min drive


Metro & Transport:
**Durgam Cheruvu / Hi-Tech Metro Station - 5 min walk**

USA VISA:
U.S. Consulate General Hyderabad - 20 min drive
U.S. Visa Application Centre - 5 min walk

Educational Institutes:
ISB (Indian School of Business) - 15 min drive
IIIT (Indian Institutes of Information Technology)- 15 min drive
HCU (Hyderabad Central University)- 20 min drive


House Rules
To ensure a smooth and enjoyable stay, we kindly request all guests to follow these guidelines:


Checkout Time: 11:00 AM sharp. Please check out on time to allow preparation for the next guest.

Guest Capacity: The room accommodates up to Max of 3 guests only. Ensure you book for the correct number of guests. To accommodate additional guests, please get in touch with us—we’d be happy to discuss the possibilities!

Private Gatherings: Allowed, but must be quiet and substance/ drug-free. Decorations should be placed only in the rooftop area and must not damage property.

Smoking: Absolutely NOT allowed inside (including e-cigarettes, hookah, cigars).

Cleaning & Pets:
Daily housekeeping is provided between 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM.
No pets allowed.

Liability Disclaimer: By booking, you acknowledge that the owner is not responsible for accidents, injuries, or loss of belongings.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Can I invite friends to stay for a few hours for free?
No. Any additional guests must be added to your booking on Airbnb.

Do you provide daily maid service?
Yes! Housekeeping staff will clean the room.

Should I bring my own linens, towels, and pillowcases?
No need! We provide fresh linens, pillows, and comforters, all washed before your visit, along with plenty of towels.

Is the room child-friendly?
Yes! Many families have stayed with us and found it to be the perfect family getaway.

Where exactly is the room located?
We are located in Madhapur, Hyderabad, near Raheja Mindspace, with excellent connectivity to metro stations, business hubs, and entertainment spots. "This The Place" (Pahadi Cuisine) is our landmark, and we are in the same building.

Is there a private kitchen in the room?
No, this is a hotel setup and not an apartment. There is a single common kitchen shared by all rooms, where guests can prepare their food if needed.

We look forward to hosting you! Let us know if you need recommendations during your stay. 😊

The space
Welcome to your perfect home base in Mehdipatnam! Whether you are here for a family vacation, medical visit, or business in HITEC City, our spacious 3BHK apartment offers the ideal blend of comfort and unmatched connectivity.
​The Location: Stay in the Heart of the Action
​Skip the long commutes! You are perfectly positioned between the charm of Old City and the buzz of the Financial District:
​Historic Wonders: Explore Golconda Fort and the Qutub Shahi Tombs (just 10–15 mins away). The iconic Charminar, Chowmahalla Palace, and Salar Jung Museum are all within easy reach.
​Tech & Business: A smooth 20-minute drive connects you to HITEC City, Madhapur, and Gachibowli, making this an ideal spot for working professionals.
​Medical Care: Peace of mind is right next door. We are minutes away from top-tier facilities like Olive Hospital, Mythri Hospital, and Care Hospitals.
​Retail Therapy: Indulge in shopping at nearby GVK One Mall or the bustling local markets of Mehdipatnam and Banjara Hills.
​Seamless Connectivity
​Step out and travel with ease. This location is one of Hyderabad’s best-connected transit points:
​On-Demand: Uber, Ola, and Rapido bikes/autos are available at your doorstep 24/7.
​Public Transit: Just a short walk to the Mehdipatnam Bus Depot, connecting you to every corner of the city via TSRTC buses.
​Metro Access: A quick 15-minute hop to the Lakdikapul or Jubilee Hills Metro Stations to beat the traffic.
​Airport Ready: The Pushpak Airport Liner stops nearby, ensuring a stress-free journey to RGIA.


​Our 3BHK is designed for relaxation, featuring airy rooms, modern amenities, and the convenience of being close to the city's best dining—from legendary Biryani spots to cozy cafes

Guest access
Our guests have access to the entire apartment and to the common areas of the building.

Other things to note
The apartment is close to Heart of Hyderabad: Luxury 3BHK with Unmatched Connectivity
​Experience the vibrant energy of Hyderabad from this modern, high-ambience apartment in Mehdipatnam. Perfectly positioned for families, medical tourists, and business travelers, this home puts the best of the city at your doorstep.
​Premier Healthcare Access
​Located in the city's primary medical corridor, you are minutes away from Hyderabad's top-tier hospitals:
​Specialized Care: Proximity to Care Hospital, Apollo Hospitals, Virinchi Hospitals, and Olive Hospital.

​A Foodie’s Paradise
​Savor the world-famous flavors of Hyderabad without the long commute. You are surrounded by legendary dining spots:
​Iconic Eats: Walk or take a 2-minute drive to Shah Ghouse for authentic Biryani or Kabul Darbar for exquisite Arabian and Afghani cuisine.

​Events & Social Hub
​Mehdipatnam is famous for its concentration of event spaces. Our apartment offers seamless proximity to all major function halls in the area, making it the perfect stay for wedding guests or group gatherings.
​Seamless Transit & Sightseeing
​Easy Commute: With its central location, Ola and Uber bookings are nearly instantaneous (usually a 2-3 minute wait).
​Business & Travel: Quick access to the PVNR Expressway ensures a smooth 15-minute drive to Banjara Hills or the Financial District, and a direct route to the Airport.
​Tourism: Short drives to the majestic Golconda Fort, Qutub Shahi Tombs, and the premium shopping centers of City Centre and GVK One Mall.

A: Prime location on the main street of chapel road Bandra west.

A: The serene hues of the sea from calming blues, relaxing grays and peaceful whites is what inspired Casa Azul’s interiors.

A: Yes, you can create an ambiance to suit your mood with lighting features and stay cool with the AC.

description:
Welcome to Victoria!
Our charming studio apartment located in Bandra West in the heart of a bustling city, offering both convenience and tranquility.

Nestled in one of Mumbai’s most charming neighborhoods, this private studio apartment offers the perfect balance of peace and city buzz. Step outside and you’ll find yourself surrounded by leafy lanes, quaint cafes, and some of Bandra’s most loved spots - Subko Coffee, Ettarra, Veronica’s and many more with BKC being just a 15 minute drive away.

The space
This private studio apartment (approx. 200 sq. ft.) features a breathtaking, original antique four-poster bed, comfortable living-sleeping space, a fully private kitchen, and a private washroom with no shared areas. Situated on the ground floor of a residential building, the apartment comes with its own entrance, offering you complete privacy. For your safety, the entrance area is under discreet CCTV surveillance.

Whether you’re here for a short getaway, a work trip, or to soak in the soul of Bandra like a local, Victoria makes for the perfect base.

Guest access
This apartment is located in Bandra West. Guests will have access to a private bedroom with an attached washroom and kitchen area. We have a semi-automatic washing machine in premises.

The room is conveniently situated on the ground floor.

Important Note on Location & Arrival
Since the apartment is nestled in a quiet Bandra bylane, vehicles and cabs cannot come directly to the doorstep. Guests will need to get down at the main road and walk a few steps to reach the entrance. Please note however that bikes and smaller vehicles do pass through the lane where the apartment is located.

The apartment is a 25-35 minutes drive away from both T1 and T2 airports.

To ensure a comfortable stay for all, we kindly ask guests to observe the following rules:

Occupancy: Maximum occupancy is strictly two guests. No visitors are permitted.
No decorations permitted.

Noise: As the apartment is in a residential area, no loud music or excessive noise is permitted at any time. Strictly no parties/gatherings or decorations are allowed.

Smoking: No smoking is permitted indoors. Guests may step outside to smoke, but we kindly request that you do not litter.

Parking: On-site parking is not available. Limited street parking may sometimes be found 10–15 minutes away, but please be advised that there are no reserved spots.

Cleaning policy:- We provide a complimentary cleaning every 4th day of stay with linen change. Incase a cleaning is needed in between it will be chargeable.

Other things to note
Check in time : 2pm to 10pm
Check out time : 11am
For Check in after 10pm please inform us at the time of booking so we can let you know accordingly.

Mandatory Pre-Check-in Requirement: All guests need to submit a Government approved ID proof copy ( except PAN card) once your booking is confirmed.

For non-Indian passport holders, please note it is essential for us as hosts to complete the "C Form" for the Foreigners Registration Office prior to your stay for which we need certain details which will be communicated with the guest post booking.

We ensure the apartment is meticulously maintained to the highest standards of cleanliness and quality. Should anything require attention during your stay, we promise to go the extra mile to address it and minimize any inconvenience.

We simply ask for your patience and understanding in the rare event of unforeseen circumstances.

description:
A cozy and colourful room in an authentic, quaint corner of the city. Our apartment overlooks a raintree garden. Home to parrots, kites, and beautiful views, the bus/ train stations,amazing cafes and restaurants are just 5min away!

The space
The Space

An affordable clean place to stay during your time in Mumbai, and especially to be able to give tourists the opportunity to stay with an Indian family and to experience Indian customs and traditions and of course also to introduce them to authentic Indian culture, cuisine and care!

Our visitors love to enjoy the private terrace overlooking a beautiful garden! We are situated ideally in a quaint and authentic quarter of the city, and evenings are best enjoyed sitting on the terrace observing the amazing birds above and the beautiful rain trees below. A cup of chai (tea) is perfect at sunrise as well!

Location – neighborhood description
It is a 5 minute walk to the train station(Mumbai Central) and Metro station Aqua Line 3(Jagannath Shankar Sheth Metro_Exit Gate B) and thus very accessible to South Bombay and North Bombay, for the purpose of easily visiting the historical and cultural sites of the city and travel to and from the airport simple and quick. There are also local bus stalls (selling tickets for private bus tours) to other towns and cities in Maharashtra and also to other interesting places in other states close by. We are about 14 km from the International airport.

There are 24-hr Pharmacies nearby and also a Reliance Supermarket at walking distance.

Other Things
You are not allowed to host parties nor have any other visitors in the apartment (other than those booked) Alcohol and smoking is prohibited.

If you are travelling for research or medical care, that requires a long-stay, you are welcome to book with us for longer periods of time as well.

You may also like to check the reviews :)

The Neighborhood

Our neighborhood is really unique, we will introduce you to our area on your arrival. There is a lovely local market nearby where we buy our vegetables etc. All religious buildings (mosque, church, and synagogue) nearby if would like to visit and pray. There are always taxis as well, so that you can grab a cab to Colaba, etc. Mostly, local families live in this quarter. It is very safe too!

Safety Practices

As per the recommended guidelines during the pandemic, we are practicing some mandatory safety measures. We are wearing masks and practicing social distancing whilst also preparing and ventilating our space for each and every guest. All the rooms are cleansed and surfaces sanitised regularly. We are addressing all the health and safety concerns and adhering to guidelines advised by our local authorities.

Guest access
We welcome our guests as family into our home. Every guest has their own key and can come and go as they please. We encourage them to enjoy the terrace, dining and living room areas and make themselves comfortable as they would do in their own home. Our kitchen is however not open for cooking meals but our guests may heat food in the microwave. However, eating in the room is not allowed, guests are welcome to eat at the dining table. Breakfast will be served from 8:30 am - 9:30 am.

Other things to note
Please note, the building elevator only comes up to the 9th floor, and our apartment is on the 10th floor, so you would need to climb up about 12 stairs to get to the flat. We can help you bring your bags up if need be :)

*There is no parking for guest vehicles in the building compound. Parking in the area is at your own risk.*

Please also note that we only accept guests who have their official ID uploaded onto Airbnb.

description:
📜 Step into colonial history as our home was built upon the former 'Pali Hill Golf Club' established in 1905 for British aristocrats in India's pre independence era. Today, its Mumbai's most sought after address, home to several Bollywood celebrities.

🏖 You can soak in the city's coastal charm with the iconic Carter Rd promenade & seaside cafes just a stroll away. Tourist attractions at Colaba/South Mumbai enjoy seamless connectivity. BOM airport is 30 mins away & Jio BKC just 20 mins.

The space
💑 This is a private room within a spacious 5BHK where I live with my wife, Pooja. We occupy 2 rooms, while the remaining 3 guest rooms host travellers from around the world.

🖼 You will feel the warmth and character of staying in a lived-in family home that has history, memories and a story to tell. The house is filled with patina, books, plants, heirloom, art and decor that has been collected over decades.

🙋‍♀️ We feel comfortable in hosting female travellers, couples or families with children. Male travellers are welcome too, preferably ones who are well reviewed, repeat guests or come through a trusted reference.

🌎 Our home is specially suited for international tourists & business travellers, OCIs and NRIs offering a culturally enriching and authentic local experience.

👐 Staying here will make you feel part of an inclusive community with the host and fellow travellers, whilst still being unobtrusive and private. Our home environment is non-judgemental and LGBTQ friendly.

🕰 Early check-in, late check-out and baggage drop off can often be arranged depending on availability.

🔑 No timing restrictions as guests will be given a house & room key at the time of check-in, so they can come & go as they like.

🥣 Fresh home-cooked Indian vegetarian meals are available at an additional cost for those who would like to experience local cuisine.

♥️ If this fits your vibe, feel free to add our listing to your wishlist.

Guest access
🛋 Living Room - Guests have full access to the living room including the dining area.

🫕 Kitchen - Guests have a limited access to the kitchen. They are free to use the microwave & sink, however, cooking is not permitted.

During your stay
📱Guests can reach us anytime, we are only a text message away.

🍽 We often interact with guests at mealtime or whenever we happen to cross paths .

👯 Fellow guests are free to engage with each other. We've seen many friendships begin that way.

Other things to note
🪜The apartment is on the 1st floor of the building and there is no elevator.

🔗 airbnb.com/h/ivory-room-mumbai

🔗 airbnb.com/h/wooden-retreat-mumbai

Guests staying for 4 nights or more will be offered free upfront cleaning service starting from the the third day and followed by every alternate day thereafter. ( Subject to staff availability which is not usually a problem.)

Every detail of our property is cared for with the highest standards — from the upkeep of amenities and electronics to the meticulous attention given to cleanliness and comfort. Please inform us in case of extra occupancy and make the necessary arrangements for the same apart from the mattress as we will only provide extra mattress for third occupant as per our arrangements which are in place for maximum 2 occupancy.



Guests staying here for 3 nights or less will not be offered free cleaning service upfront .
There Will be a minimal cash charge of Rs.200 which should be handed over to the cleaner itself . The guests will have to notify the host i.e myself one day In advance then the cleaning will be arranged for the next day only at 11 am fixed time . (Timing may vary subject to staff availability )

Guests staying for 4 nights or more will be offered free upfront cleaning service starting from the the third day and followed by every alternate day thereafter. ( Subject to staff availability which is not usually a problem.)

Every detail of our property is cared for with the highest standards — from the upkeep of amenities and electronics to the meticulous attention given to cleanliness and comfort. While it’s rare, should any minor electronic or plumbing issue arise, we may require a short maintenance window of 1–3 hours to ensure everything is swiftly restored to perfection. Our goal is to make your stay as seamless and comfortable as possible.

description:
"Welcome to Nani Ka Ghar – The Sunshine Swing bunk ,is a dreamy upper bunk in our 4-bed dorm. Bathed in golden sunlight from the balcony, it feels playful and nostalgic—just like a childhood swing. The space is shared with three like-minded women, fostering connection and creativity. With free art supplies, an open balcony, and calming natural light, it's a place to rest, heal, and express yourself in the heart of Bandra." 🌞

The space
WELCOME TO NANI KA GHAR – A SAFE & CREATIVE SPACE FOR WOMEN
🌟 CONFIGURATION
A spacious 2BHK home on the terrace floor, designed to host up to 6 women travellers comfortably.

📏 SIZE
A massive 1000 sq. ft. space with open, airy areas to relax, create, and connect.

🏡 FACILITIES

✔ Fresh linens & towels
✔ 8” orthopedic mattress for extra comfort.
✔ Toiletries : Shampoo + Body wash
✔ Hot water shower
✔ Iron board + Iron
✔ High-speed WiFi in all rooms
✔ Dedicated dressing area with full length mirror in room
✔ Dedicated 10ft cupboard with lock
✔ JBL Bluetooth speakers
✔ Fully equipped kitchen with all cooking utensils
✔ Kitchen Appliances : Microwave + Gas + kettle + fridge +water purifier
✔ Coffee ,Sugar and Tea
✔ Wine and Whisky glasses
✔ Cozy TV room with a home theatre system
✔ Dining area
✔ Two balconies with vibrant plants
✔ Huge terrace for open-air relaxation
✔ luggage drop area
✔ Cozy book corner with diverse reads for a relaxing evening
✔ Art Studio



🌊 FAMOUS FOR
🏖️ 2-minute walk to Carter Road Beach – A perfect spot for evening strolls.
🎬 5 minutes from Bollywood icon Shah Rukh Khan’s house – If you're lucky, you might catch a wave from the King of Bollywood himself!
🎨 LOCATED IN CHUIM VILLAGE – A charming, old-world neighbourhood known for its artistic vibe, Portuguese-style cottages, and creative community. One of Bandra’s hidden gems, it blends heritage, culture, and modern artistic influence, making it a perfect space for travellers and artists alike.

🎒 TRAVELER’S PERK
We offer a dedicated luggage area where you can store your belongings on chargeable basis.

🎨 UNIQUE FEATURE – THE ART STUDIO
At Nani Ka Ghar, creativity flows freely! We provide all art supplies, so you can paint, sketch, or express yourself on any size canvas. Leave behind a piece of your art, and if we love it, you might just win a free stay—either for your current booking or in the future!

💃THE GLAM CORNER ✨
A dedicated dressing area with a full-length mirror, bathed in golden natural light. Here, you can unleash your inner diva, experiment with styles, and spend endless hours pampering yourself. Whether you're getting ready for a day out or simply admiring your glow, this sunlit corner is your space to feel radiant, confident, and effortlessly you. ✨💃🌿


📚 COZY BOOK CORNER
Unwind in our inviting book nook, filled with a variety of fiction, non-fiction, poetry, and travel books. Whether you want to escape into a novel, explore new ideas, or simply enjoy a peaceful evening with a book, our reading space is the perfect retreat.

🌿 HEALING & RELAXATION
💆‍♀️ AYURVEDIC BODY MASSAGE SERVICES – Need to unwind? We offer professional Ayurvedic massages for deep relaxation and body relief. Just let us know a day in advance, and we’ll arrange for a trained professional at your preferred time.

🌿 NEIGHBORHOOD & AMBIENCE
Surrounded by lush green palm trees, our home is a peaceful oasis in the midst of Mumbai’s energy. A birdwatcher’s delight, the space brings a sense of calm with vibrant colours, greenery, and extended balconies where you can unwind.

☕ FOOD & CULTURE
Nestled in Chuim Village, a buzzing hub for artists and travellers, you’ll find:
🍛 Affordable Indian food & local snack corners
🫖 Authentic tea stalls & fresh fruit vendors
🎨 Street art & creative collaborations—you might even bump into a famous graffiti artist or discover your next dream project over a casual coffee!

🧼 CLEANING & HYGIENE
Our all-female housekeeping team keeps the space spotless. Sarita & Reshmi, our trusted housekeepers, have been with us for over 10 years. They are more than staff—they are family, and they’ll treat you like family too. Cleaning hours: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM daily.

💛 OUR MISSION
We are a humble team of women creators with a vision: to provide a safe, inspiring, and creative space for women travellers across India. Whether you're here to explore, heal, or create, we welcome you to a home where safety, art, and community come together.

Guest access
This home has two rooms – one with 4 dorm beds and another with 2 beds. During your stay, you will be in the dorm room with three other female guests.

🛏️ PRIVATE ACCESS
✔ Your space includes a cozy upper right bunk (Bed No.3) with an 8” orthopedic mattress for extra comfort.
✔ A personal cupboard with a lock for secure storage.

🚪 SHARED ACCESS IN BEDROOM
✔ The attached washroom and balcony will be shared with another guest in your room.
✔ If no other guests are staying, you might have the whole room to yourself! We’ll update you before your arrival.

🏡 SHARED ACCESS IN THE HOUSE
✔ Dining area – Enjoy your meals in a cozy setting.
✔ Kitchen – Fully equipped for cooking.
✔ Hall & TV room – A relaxing communal space.
✔ Luggage area – keep your belongings at home.
✔ Terrace (Limited Access) – Accessible only through the loft. Please ask the loft guest before using it and be mindful of their space.

This home balances privacy, comfort, and a welcoming shared environment for women travellers.

During your stay
For any questions or assistance, feel free to reach out to me on Airbnb, and I’ll respond as soon as possible. In case of an emergency, you can call me directly between 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM.

Other things to note
✔ OLD-WORLD CHARM – This home is in a very old building on the 3RD FLOOR WITHOUT A LIFT. Please keep this in mind before booking.

✔ LUGGAGE ASSISTANCE – Since the flat is on the 3RD FLOOR WITHOUT A LIFT, we offer luggage drop-off and pick-up services at an additional charge.

✔ AFFORDABLE PRICING – Our rates are lower than other BnBs in the neighborhood due to the shared living setup, making it a budget-friendly option.

✔ NO VISITORS ALLOWED | MEN STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED – To ensure privacy and security, outside visitors are not permitted, and men are strictly not allowed in the space.

✔ MINDFUL WATER USAGE – Mumbai is facing water shortages due to ongoing construction. While we have backup water in containers, excessive use may deplete the supply. If this happens, the host is not liable, and arranging a water tanker may take up to a day. Please use water responsibly. 💧

✔ KITCHEN USE & CLEANLINESS – If you choose to cook your meals, you must wash your own dishes and ensure all food waste is discarded before checkout. As this is a shared space, cleanliness is key to maintaining a comfortable stay for everyone.

✔ REPAIR AND CLEANING - House cleaning is carried out by female staff from 12:00–3:00 pm and 5:00–7:30 pm, during which they may need access to all areas. Repairs and maintenance by male technicians are scheduled between 1:00–3:00 pm or 5:00–7:30 pm. If you have any privacy concerns, please let us know in advance so we can guide the staff accordingly.

✔ CAMERA - Please note, for everyone’s safety and security, CCTV cameras are installed outside the entrance .

✔ EARLY CHECK-IN / LATE CHECKOUT – Only allowed with prior approval and extra charge. Kindly reach out to the hosts to arrange for the same

Your cooperation ensures a smooth and pleasant experience for all guests. 💖✨

description:
This is a NO SMOKING premium 1-bedroom apt styled in a Mediterranean theme.

It is located in Andheri (Oshiwara), in a gated, secure building. Many fantastic restaurants/bars/shops are within walking distance. It is close to Mumbai Airport, Kokilaben and Nanavati Hospitals.

The bed has premium bedding. The curtain features blackout backing, and the window is double-glazed for complete soundproofing. Premium towels and bath essentials are provided.

Maid service is provided on alternate days.

The space
The cosy, air-conditioned and spacious living room (designed by a Spanish architect) has a large sofa and a classy wooden bench with a centre table.

A lovely wooden work desk is provided for all who want to work.

The living room Wi-Fi has fast internet speeds.

The apartment features a self-sufficient, well-equipped pantry-kitchen with a large fridge, microwave oven, induction hotplate, toaster and utensils.

If required, daily maid service is available for dishwashing. A complete house-cleaning service is provided every third day.

The cosy bedroom features a king-size bed, premium-quality mattresses, sheets, and pillows made by “HUSH” for optimum comfort and sleep. It also has a sofa where you can read your favourite book, sip coffee, or gaze out the window while sitting in the artistic wrought-iron chair.

The windows have vacuum glass, making them soundproof. The bedroom is designed for peaceful nights and fresh mornings.

The access to the beautiful bathroom is from the bedroom, and it has a shower area with a glass partition.

There is a place to hang/place your clothes.

There is a wooden balcony for those who want fresh air.

A complete, unlimited coffee/tea station is available for you.

You are greeted with a small tray of goodies. Feel free to enjoy them.

If you need laundry services, we will suggest several cost-effective, convenient options.

Guest access
You will have exclusive access to the entire apartment, except certain cupboards and cabinets which contain my personal belongings and are locked.

Other things to note
This is a STRICTLY NO SMOKING rental. If you are a smoker, book somewhere else. Action will be taken against all guests who are found smoking.

The well-stocked pantry, with a microwave, large fridge, toaster, induction heater, and utensils, is perfect for cooking small meals like eggs and noodles.

A complete coffee/tea station is available for you.

You are greeted with a small tray of goodies. Feel free to enjoy them.

The maid will come every other day to clean the apartment and refill the water, coffee, etc. The bedsheets will be replaced every five days.

No parties or get-togethers/functions are allowed in the apartment, and no commercial activity is permitted.

A third family member of up to 14 years is welcome with the parents, and we will provide a floor mattress with pillows, sheets, etc.

Parking is not available in the building; please park outside the gate. No guest or visitor has faced any issues with parking so far.

There are numerous shops just a few steps from the gate for everyday items such as toiletries, medications, and groceries.

Basic ingredients for cooking are provided.

description:
Warm, Modern & Cosy Home!

+ Entire apartment (1 Living, 1 Bedroom, 1 Kitchen & 1 bathroom), Area - 382 Sq feet

+ Complete privacy & safety.

+ KING Size Bed, Wardrobe & Cloth Iron

+ Sofa, TV, Dinning/Coffee table

+ Kitchen equipped with Refrigerator, Hob, RO water filter, Microwave Oven, Washing Machine, Electric Kettle etc.

+Ideal place for couples , business travelers & small family.

+ Its located on 9th floor. Free Parking at PODIUM level, slot no- 21

The space
It has following things for Guests comfort.

Apartment has the following items

★ Living Room with Dining Area with A/c★
Sofa, Coffee table, Side table, Dining Table with Chairs, Smart TV, WiFi.

★ Bedroom with A/c★
King Size Bed (Sleeps 2 Guests), Mattress, Pillows, Bedsheet, blanket, Wardrobe with hangers, lock & key, Cloth Iron

★Kitchen★
Refrigerator, Microwave Oven, Gas stove, Chimney, RO/Water Filter, Dishes, Glasses, Bowls, Cooking Utensils, Pans, Hot water Kettle, Cutlery, Sugar, Salt, Coffee, Tea, Dishwashing Soap, Washing Machine

★Bathroom★
Shower, Hot water Geyser, Western T/Seat, Bath towels, hand towel, and bathmats, Body wash, Shampoo, Hand wash, Mirror, Toilet paper + Electric kettle

Guest access
Guest can have this whole flat (382 Sq feet), which has 1 Living room, 1 Bedroom, 1 Kitchen & 1 Bathroom.

Other things to note
Check-In & Check-Out ⏰
• Check-In: 2:00 PM
Check-In & Check-Out ⏰
• Check-Out: 11:00 AM
• Early Check-In: Unfortunately, early check-in is not available.
• Late Check-Out: A late check-out is not possible. Extensions beyond 11.00 AM are not possible due to tight cleaning schedules. Without prior notice and approval: There will be a charge of INR 1,500 per hour for late check-out.


Booking rules
• Strict policy (not allowed) for local unmarried couples from Mumbai. As there has been recent complains/feedback from society.
• No unregistered guests allowed
• Mandatory Govt id's required for guests (apart from Booker's)
• Mandatory FORM C submission for foreign guests (Passport identity & home residential address page, Ticket, photo) required
• Extra fee of Rs 999, beyond 2 guests (extra single mattress foam/Indian cotton gaddaa, depending upon availability) will be provided to use in living room floor area)
• No parties allowed since this is a residential building, Violations will result in a ₹5,000 charges
• No smoking inside the apartment. Violations will result in a ₹5,000 charges
• No Pets allowed, Violations will result in a ₹5,000 charges
• Please note that during the booking, you will be shown a generic location of the apartment. Only after the confirmed bookings, you will be able to have exact address of the building.

Parking 🚗
• Parking Availability at Podium level, no -21
• Unauthorized Parking: Vehicles parked in unauthorized areas will be clamped by building authorities, and any fines incurred will be the guest’s responsibility.

Luggage 🧳
• Storage Facility: We do not have a reception or luggage storage facility. Guests are advised to plan accordingly.

Support & Emergency Contact 📞
• Availability: We are available via Airbnb App and WA except 11pm – 7 am Singapore time (8.30pm-4.30am Indian time).
• Emergencies: For emergencies such as electricity, water, safety, or major breakdowns, guests may contact us at any time.
• Neighbor Assistance: Please refrain from approaching neighbors or building reception for assistance.

Internet 🌐
• Wi-Fi: We provide Wi-Fi with unlimited data. However, in the event of a cable snap, repairs may take 1-2 days.
• Hotspot Device: Guests for whom internet reliability is critical are encouraged to bring their own hotspot device.

Maintenance 🛠️
• Energy Conservation: Guests are requested to switch off lights, taps, ACs, and the geyser when not in use. This precaution helps prevent accidents, such as geyser pipe bursts or power outages, which can be challenging to resolve promptly.
• Repairs: In the event of electronic failures (AC, TV, geyser, fridge, microwave), repairs may take 24-48 hours.
• Reporting Issues: In case anything in the apartment is not working or is damaged, please inform us immediately so that we can fix it at the earliest & no monetary compensation will be provided.

Linens & Towels 🛏️🧺
• Provision: Bed linens and bath towels are provided upon check-in and refreshed once every 3rd day.
• Additional Charges: Additional linen changes are available for ₹350 per set, and extra towels can be provided at ₹50 per towel.
• Damages: Towels or linens stained with oil, makeup, or pen marks will incur a charge of the item damaged.

Single-Use Plastics 🚯
• Policy: We do not provide single-use plastic items such as toothbrushes, toothpaste, or disposable utensils. Guests are encouraged to bring their own reusable items.

Housekeeping 🧹
• Service: Housekeeping services are complimentary every day of the stay from 12:00- 2PM PM. If guests plan to be out during this time, Housekeeping has a spare key.
• Extra Cleaning: Extra cleaning sessions at ₹200 per session.

Laundry 👕
• Service: Laundry is managed by the housekeeper.
• Free Loads: Guests are entitled to two free laundry loads per week (up to 12 clothes per load).
• Additional Loads: Additional loads are charged at ₹300 each.

House Rules & Charges 📜⚠️
To maintain a safe and pleasant environment for all, we have established the following rules:
• No Drugs: The consumption or storage of drugs is strictly prohibited.
• No Pets: Pets are not allowed on the premises.
• Parties: Parties or gatherings are strictly prohibited. Violations will result in a ₹5,000 Charges.
• No Weapons: Weapons of any kind are not permitted on the property.
• No Flammable Materials: Flammable or explosive materials, or items with strong odours, are not allowed.
• No Open Flames: The use of agarbatti, incense sticks, or candles is prohibited.
• Gas Stove Safety: Ensure the cooktop knobs are turned off and the gas supply is shut when not in use.
• No Photography/Filming: Professional photography or filming is not permitted.
• Quiet Hours: Guests are requested to maintain quiet between 10:00 PM and 8:00 AM.
• Unregistered Visitors: Allowing unregistered guests will result in a ₹5,000 Charges.
• Damages or Loss: Damages to the property or loss of keys/remotes will incur a minimum charges of ₹1,500.
• Appliances Left On: Leaving appliances like the geyser, AC, lights, Fan on when not in use will result in a ₹1,500 charges per appliance.
• Rearranging Furniture or Attaching Items to Walls: Costs will apply for any unauthorized changes to the property.

After Check-Out 🚪
• Lost Items: We are not responsible for items left behind after check-out. Unclaimed items will be disposed of within 24 hours & unfortunately there is no space for storage. A fee of ₹500 will apply for coordinating the pickup of left-behind items.

Guest Responsibility
• Safety: Guests are responsible for their safety and the safety of their companions, including children, elderly individuals, or unwell persons.
• Caution: Caution is advised, particularly in washrooms, as wet floors may become slippery. We are not liable for any injuries sustained on the premises.

Extension of Stay 📅
• Availability: Extended stays are subject to availability, please initiate through Airbnb App always.

Disclaimers ⚠️
• Construction Noise: We are not liable for disturbances caused by nearby construction activities.
• Power Outages: Power outages, including those caused by weather conditions, are beyond our control, and compensation cannot be offered.
• Illegal Activities: Engaging in illegal activities, including drug use or possession, is strictly prohibited. Guests will be solely responsible for any legal issues arising from their actions, including fines or Charges incurred by us due to the guest’s conduct. This includes any costs or damages resulting from police or legal interventions.

Thank you for taking the time to review these guidelines. Your cooperation ensures a safe, comfortable, and enjoyable experience for all our guests and neighbors.

Warm regards,

HOUSE RULES

2 - Please do not eat on the bed, as food stains can spoil the bedsheets. We request you to eat either at the table inside the room or at the round table in the balcony.

3 - Please keep all doors and windows closed while the AC is being used, and kindly remember to switch it off if you step out.

4 - Please note that the housekeeping staff usually comes around 10:00 AM. We request your cooperation during the cleaning time. In case you are stepping out, kindly keep the door open so that the room, bathroom, and balcony can be cleaned before you return.

6 - If any food is ordered after 10:00 PM, kindly go down to the main gate to collect the parcel, as the society does not allow deliveries up to the apartment after 10:00 PM.

7 - We recommend keeping the windows closed during sunset hours, as mosquitoes and moths tend to enter the room during this season. The net window may be used for ventilation.

description:
The Bandra Chapter is a spacious, cozy apartment located right next to Boojee Cafe, just off Carter Road at Perry Cross Road. Stay in the heart of Bandra, surrounded by the best cafés, restaurants, nightlife, and everything the city has to offer. Carter Road is just a short walk away, making the location extremely convenient and lively. Perfect for families, corporates, and travelers looking to experience Bandra’s main limelight with comfort, feel-good vibes, and a prime location.

The space
The Bandra Chapter is more than just a stay — it’s a warm little pause in the heart of Mumbai’s most loved neighborhood. Tucked right next to Boojee Cafe and just off Carter Road at Perry Cross Road, this spacious apartment places you exactly where Bandra comes alive. Morning coffees, evening walks by the sea, charming cafés, buzzing restaurants, nightlife, boutiques, and the city’s best corners are all just around you.
Step into a home designed with comfort and ease in mind. The living room is open and welcoming, with soft cozy vibes that instantly make you feel at home. A bright yellow sofa-cum-bed comfortably sleeps two guests, while the grey single sofa-cum-bed adds extra comfort for another. Both the living room and bedroom are air-conditioned, making the space relaxing through every season.
The bedroom feels calm and restful, with a king-size bed, a study desk for work-from-home days, wardrobe space, and an attached washroom with hot water. Fast 100 Mbps WiFi keeps you connected whether you’re working, streaming, or simply unwinding.
The kitchen is spacious and functional — perfect for slow breakfasts, home-cooked meals, and long conversations over dinner. Equipped with a fridge, washing machine, dining table, and all essentials, the apartment blends convenience with warmth effortlessly.
Located on the ground floor and surrounded by everything Bandra has to offer, The Bandra Chapter is for those who want to feel the city, live the location, and come home to comfort at the end of the day.

Guest access
Guests have exclusive access to the entire 1BHK apartment with complete privacy — no sharing, no disturbances, just your own cozy space to unwind. One of our staff members will personally assist you with the check-in, hand over the keys, and ensure you settle in comfortably.

The apartment is located on the ground floor of an old residential building in Bandra.

Please keep the noise levels low and be respectful of the neighbors and the community around you.

The space
Sky Den • Khar/Bandra

Welcome to Sky Den — a warm, spacious, and thoughtfully designed apartment in the heart of Khar/Bandra, just off the famous Linking Road. The location is truly the highlight here — surrounded by popular cafés, bars, restaurants, shopping streets, and everyday conveniences, all within walking distance. Whether you’re visiting Mumbai for leisure, work, shopping, or a longer stay, you’ll be right in the center of everything.

Spacious by Bandra standards, Sky Den is perfect for couples, solo travelers, families, and long stays alike. With easy connectivity to South Bombay, BKC, Juhu, and the airport, it offers the perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and city life in one of Mumbai’s most loved neighborhoods.

Guest access

• The apartment is located in the heart of Khar/Bandra in a very prime and lively neighborhood, with cafés, restaurants, bars, shopping, and daily conveniences all around.

Enjoy an open-plan living area, fully-equipped kitchen, and serene bedrooms with premium amenities. Close to top dining, shopping, and cultural spots, it's the perfect base to explore Delhi. The space

Nestled in the prestigious and sought-after neighborhood of Safdarjung Enclave, this stunning 3-bedroom home offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and serenity. Whether you're a family looking for a spacious retreat or a group of friends exploring the vibrant city of Delhi, our home is designed to cater to all your needs with the utmost attention to detail.

Space and Design
Our home is a celebration of minimalist design and natural light. The interiors are thoughtfully curated to create a peaceful and clutter-free environment, allowing you to relax and unwind in style.
