You'll find a well-lit bedroom with a walk-in closet and a private bathroom.
The living area is comfy with a sofa cum bed, TV, and some books, plus a handy mini fridge.

The bedroom and living room both have AC to keep you cool.

The space
The whole place will be yours to enjoy. It's a private unit located in a quiet, clean, and spacious area. There’s free parking on the street right outside the apartment. The property faces a garden, and it’s bright, open, and modern. You can check in yourself, making the process simple and easy.

Guest access
The whole place is exclusively for the guest, as it’s a fully private unit.

Other things to note
Where you’ll be

Nangal Dewat in Vasant Kunj is a peaceful and premier neighbourhood located in the heart of South Delhi, just a short 20-minute drive from the airport. The area is known for its serene surroundings and ample greenery, including the Aravalli Biodiversity Park where people go for morning walks and bird watching.

Nangal Dewat has a beautiful and calm surrounding and for convenient transportation to nearby areas, Ola and Uber cabs are easily available at any time. For availing public transport facility, you will need to walk for around 350-400 meters and you can easily find a city bus to travel to metro station/airport or any part of the city.

For leisure activities, the nearby Qutub Minar and Mehrauli Archaeological Park are must-visit attractions. Aerocity and Cyberhub, which are popular entertainment hubs in the city are also located nearby.

There is ample availability of shops for daily need items and you can enjoy shopping at Ambience mall, DLF promenade and DLF Emporio at Vasant Kunj.

Getting around

Metros
a) Vasant Vihar Metro (Magenta Line) - 5.8 kms
b) Aerocity Metro (Airport Line) - 5.7 kms
c) Chhattarpur Metro (Yellow line) - 6.3 kms

Airports
a) T3 Airport - 6.8 kms
b) T1 Airport - 8.2 kms
c) T2 Airport - 9.8 kms

Railway Stations
NDLS Train Station - 19 kms
Nizamuddin Railway Station - 19 kms


Unfortunately, public transportation in the area is not easily accessible. However, autorickshaws can be found on the main street. For a more convenient and reliable mode of transportation, I suggest booking cabs through ride-hailing apps such as Ola or Uber.

The parking spot for the apartment is located on the street in front of the building. Occasionally, other cars may be parked in the area, there are plenty of spots around the building and you always get a free space.

description:
A bright, spacious 3-bedroom apartment in Jangpura Extension, ideal for families, groups, and business travellers seeking comfort and top-tier connectivity.

Enjoy three en-suite bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, balcony, patio, fast Wi-Fi, and daily housekeeping.

Just minutes from metro, restaurants, markets, and major landmarks like Pragati Maidan, High Court, Supreme Court, JLN Stadium and central Delhi.

Superhost with consistent 5-star hospitality.

The space
Experience a comfortable and centrally located stay in our airy first-floor 3-bedroom apartment in Jangpura Extension, South Delhi.

The home offers a bright living room with sofa seating, a king chair, and a TV, along with a connected dining area for six that serves perfectly for meals or remote work.

The fully equipped kitchen includes a gas stove, refrigerator, microwave, cookware, utensils, and all basic essentials to help you prepare meals with ease.

Each of the three bedrooms is furnished with a double bed and has an attached private bathroom, ensuring comfort and privacy for families and groups.

The rooms receive ample natural light and ventilation, making the entire home feel open and inviting.

The front balcony is ideal for enjoying tea or reading, while the rear patio offers a peaceful spot for quiet relaxation.

Guests have access to high-speed Wi-Fi, a washing machine, an iron, and daily housekeeping (except Sundays and National Holidays.)

A functional lift provides easy access to the apartment, and one private parking space behind the house ensures added convenience for guests travelling with a vehicle.

The neighbourhood is extremely convenient, with INOX cinema, McDonald’s, Subway, Haldiram’s, pharmacies, grocery stores, and salons just a short walk away.

Popular markets including Khan Market, Greater Kailash, South Extension, and Lajpat Nagar are easily accessible.

Major landmarks such as Pragati Maidan, JLN Stadium, the Supreme Court, High Court, Nizamuddin Railway Station, Connaught Place, and embassy areas are all within a short driving distance.

Jangpura Metro Station, just a 5-minute walk away, provides seamless connectivity across Delhi. Taxi, pick-up, and drop-off services are available on request for added convenience.

As a Superhost for more than a year, I am committed to providing a clean, reliable, and guest-friendly experience, ensuring your stay is stress-free and enjoyable, whether you’re visiting for work, leisure, or long-term needs.

Guest access
Guests have full, private access to the entire apartment, including all three bedrooms, attached bathrooms, living room, dining area, fully equipped kitchen, front balcony, and rear patio.

The building’s lift is accessible 24/7 without a code or key.

Daily housekeeping is provided, covering rooms, bathrooms, kitchen, balcony, and bed-making.

Other things to note
All guests must provide valid ID at check-in, as required by Delhi Government regulations.

Breakfast is not included in the stay.

Room heaters are available on request for an additional daily charge.

Visitors are allowed only with prior permission and must present valid identification; visitor access is permitted until 8 PM. Parties, loud gatherings, and unauthorised visitors are not allowed to maintain the comfort and safety of all guests and neighbours.

Strictly no recreational drugs, solicitation, or any illegal activity; such behaviour may result in cancellation of the booking.

Daily cleaning is provided except on Sundays and national holidays, and linens and towels are not changed daily as maintain sustainability.

Our aim is to ensure a clean, safe, and comfortable environment for every guest staying with us.

Includes 2 bedrooms, attached washrooms & fully equipped kitchen with cookware, tableware & bar glasses. Our 24/7 staff handles cleaning or anything at no extra cost with professional cook services. Stay, celebrate, and repeat. No restrictions, just fun.

The space
Our apartment is located in Kailash Hills, a green, secure, and upscale neighborhood in South Delhi. Please read through all the details and house rules before booking to ensure a seamless and memorable experience.

The location offers excellent connectivity to key landmarks across the city, including India Gate, ISKCON Temple, Lotus Temple, and more. The apartment is on the lower ground floor, so there's no need to worry about stairs or elevators. Our caretaker and staff are available 24/7 to assist with luggage or anything else you may need. We also deeply respect your privacy, ensuring a peaceful and undisturbed stay.

Here's a detailed look at our space.

Bedrooms:

Bedroom 1 (Master Bedroom):
Bed: King size bed.
Amenities: Large TV for binge watching or movie nights.
Attached Bathroom: Yes.
Workstation: Yes

Bedroom 2:
Bed: Queen size bed.
Amenities: Large TV.
Attached Bathroom: Yes.

Living Area:
Seating: Comfortable indoor gathering space enough to easily accomodate 10+ people, connecting both bedrooms and the kitchen, the heart of your stay.
Entertainment: A large TV and a powerful boAt home theatre system. Whether it's a movie marathon, a cricket watch party, or a playlist fueled evening, this room delivers. Turn up the volume, dim the lights, and let the vibe take over.

Kitchen:
We take pride in our fully equipped kitchen, designed to bring out the hidden chef in you!
Cooking Essentials: 2 burner induction cooktop for smooth, uninterrupted cooking.
High Quality Utensils: Certified steel and iron utensils for healthy and delicious meals.
Serving & Beverage Essentials: Steel and glass utensils, wine glasses for cozy evenings, and beer mugs for casual hangouts. We've got you covered.
Equipment: Large refrigerator, microwave, air fryer, and more. Perfect for any culinary adventure.
Basic spices and oils are available to get you started.
Fresh Food on Demand: Not in the mood to cook? We offer a paid chef service with a difference. Unlike restaurants, we don't store pre made food. Every dish is freshly prepared only after you place your order. Whether it's North Indian, South Indian, or something special, just let us know and we'll handle the rest.

Host Availability:
If you need anything, whether it's a small request or an unexpected alien invasion, I'm Kunal Khanna, your host, available 24/7 to make your stay smooth and enjoyable.

Read house rules in the next section.

Guest access
The entire lower ground floor is exclusively yours and won’t be shared with anyone else.

Other things to note
If you have any questions, just send them through the message box, and you'll get a response in minutes, or maybe even seconds 😉.

description:
Surrounded by Mughal architecture and narrow lanes which navigate you to magnificent Havelis. As you step down there will be places catering mouth watering street food and a whole bunch of things to take back as souvenir. Being a central location it is closer to everywhere you want to travel.

The space
MUST READ!

Welcome to our enchanting haveli nestled in the heart of Old Delhi! Built by our great-great grandfather, our home would provide a perfect abode while you set out to the old city to discover the grandeur of a bygone era.

As soon as you arrive, you'll be swept away by the sights, sounds, and flavours of this mesmerising part of the city. Your rooftop room offers breathtaking views of the iconic Jama Masjid on side and the Red fort on the other! If you are lucky enough, you would also witness the age-old tradition of _kabootar bazi_ (pigeon racing ) as men guide flocks of pigeons from their roofs! The spacious outdoor garden provides a peaceful oasis where you can unwind and recharge. You’ll also be provided with personalised services, mouth-watering home-cooked meals and a warm and welcoming atmosphere that will make you feel like part of our family.

Our home is only a few steps away from the bustling streets of Old Delhi. Lose yourself in the labyrinthine Mughal-era lane dotted with with magnificent Havelies, marvel in the grandeur of Mughal architecture, indulge in mouthwatering street food and discover the unique souvenirs at Chandni Chowk market. With Metro stations a short 10-minute walk away, the entire city is within your reach.

As your dedicated local host, we'll be delighted to share the secrets of Old Delhi with you, guiding you to the hidden treasures that only insiders know about. Whether it's savouring authentic street food, bargaining at bustling markets, or exploring the rich historical sites, we'll be your trusted companions on this remarkable journey. We can't wait to welcome you into our home and introduce you to the magic of this incredible neighborhood!

FEW THINGS ABOUT OLD DELHI:

Keeping the history of Delhi on its lap, Old Delhi is an integral part of the city, celebrated for its food, shopping, and heritage. However, Old Delhi presents challenges like chaotic traffic, crowded streets, local vendors, roaming animals, and an overwhelming mix of smells and sounds that can overload your senses. Yet, its vibrant chaos and deeply rooted traditions, carried by generations of residents, make it a fascinating experience. Visit with an open mind and a sense of adventure, ready to explore bustling markets, historic monuments, and flavourful street food. Be patient, dress modestly, and let your curiosity lead you through iconic spots. With wonder and flexibility, you’ll discover the heart of Delhi’s timeless charm.

------------------------

Communication is key during your stay with us, as many concerns can easily be resolved by simply sharing them with me or my mother. We deeply value your presence and take pride in welcoming guests from all parts of the world. While we strive to meet your needs, there may be times when we might not be able to fulfill them entirely. However, if you communicate with us in a timely manner, we will do everything we possibly can to make your stay comfortable and enjoyable. Our goal is to provide you with the best service within our abilities, and open communication helps us ensure your experience is as seamless and pleasant as possible.

Other things to note
- Our delightful homemade vegetarian breakfast, served with love and care, comes complementary.

-The lunch or dinner are served. A prior intimation of 2-3 hrs. would be appreciated.

- The residence is shared with my joint family, and we would value your consideration and respect during your stay.

- It is expected that the person reserving the room on Airbnb should be the same individual who will be staying. If someone else is booking on your behalf, please inform the host in advance for safety reasons. Any discrepancies may not be accepted.

-The property features stairs that you’ll need to climb to reach your room. They are an integral part of the property’s historic charm and character, preserving its authentic soul, and therefore cannot be altered.

-If you're visiting during a festival or event, please expect some noise in the house. We recommend checking before your arrival for any major festivals or national events, as some monuments or markets may be closed.

-Our house offers character, culture, and a true Old Delhi experience. Nestled in the heart of the city's historic charm, this space is perfect for those who want to soak in the sights, sounds, and flavors of authentic local life. It's ideal for travelers who value meaningful stays over just a place to crash. If you're looking for a deeper connection to the city, this is the place for you.

description:
This 2-bedroom apartment in Hauz Khas Village is a true gem. With its blend of colonial and art deco furniture, abundant natural light, brilliant artwork, and a shared terrace boasting stunning views, it offers a unique and unforgettable living experience.

The space
Discover the comfort and elegance of our private 2-bedroom apartment, each room featuring its own attached bathroom. Immerse yourself in the relaxing ambiance , complemented by tasteful colonial doors, and stylish art deco furniture. The space is adorned with beautiful artwork, providing a unique and inviting atmosphere.

The apartment boasts a fully equipped kitchen complete with a modern induction 2-burner stove, allowing you the convenience to prepare meals during your stay. Entertainment is at your fingertips with a 42-inch 4K TV offering access to popular streaming services such as Netflix, Hotstar, Sony Liv, Jio Cinema, and Amazon pre-login.

Terrace and Views

Enjoy stunning vistas of the 14th-century fort of Emperor Allauddin Khilji and the adjacent lake from our communal terrace, easily accessible via a lift for your convenience.

Start your day by preparing breakfast, and savor it in the outdoor seating area while relishing a picturesque view of the lake.

For added convenience, two washing machines are available on the terrace for your use. You can also utilize the provided clothes-drying stands to dry your laundry.

Moreover, from our terrace, catch a captivating glimpse of the historic Qutub Minar, adding further charm to your stay.

Guest access
During your stay in our 2-bedroom apartment, you'll have complete access to:

*Bedrooms and Attached Toilets- Enjoy the privacy and comfort of both bedrooms, each with its own attached toilet for your convenience.

*Fully Equipped Kitchen- Make yourself at home in our well-equipped kitchen, offering everything you need to prepare your favorite meals.

*Entertainment- Kick back and relax in the living area furnished with a 43-inch 4K smart TV. Access your preferred streaming apps like Netflix, Amazon Prime, and Hotstar for endless entertainment options.

Other things to note
1. **Location and Access:**
- The apartment is located on the 2nd floor and can be conveniently accessed via an elevator. The terrace area is a shared space for all residents.

2. **Laundry Facilities:**
- A washing machine is available for use in the terrace area. Guests are welcome to utilize this amenity during their stay.


3. **Terrace Features:**
- Enjoy a stunning view from the beautiful terrace, equipped with outdoor seating.

4. **Parking Information:**
- Please note that there's no reserved parking available. Guests can park in the nearby MCD paid parking, conveniently situated within walking distance.

5. **Alteration requests

We regret to inform you that we are unable to accommodate any alteration changes if your reservation is scheduled within 15 days.

description:
Tucked into Delhi's historic neighborhood Mehrauli, this stunning heritage property includes 4 rooms, a architecturally-stunning courtyard, a living and dining area flooded with light, and a welcome room with a floating couch. Your room will include a double bed, a small desk, and comfortable AC.

The space
A simple, bold stone marks the entrance to Siddiq Manzil, located just off the winding street between Mehta Chowk and the Zafar Mahal in Delhi's most historical neighborhood - Mehrauli. This stone stands as a reminder of a property whose history includes many chapters. Built in 1936, Siddiq Manzil has gone through many iterations, yet stands today to tell the history of a this historical yet rapidly-changing village.

Named for the two brothers who built it, "Siddiq" means honesty, sincerity, and truth and "Manzil" means house or destination. Reflecting the name, Siddiq Manzil today stands as a place of integrity and trustworthiness for travelers, especially those looking for a family-friendly, warm, and culturally-rich place to stay.

Located in the middle of bustling Mehrauli, Siddiq Manzil isn't the easiest place to find. Yet in return for the accessibility challenge you'll receive a calm, quiet, and beautiful experience inside the door and a culturally and historically rich experience outside the doors.

Guest access
You'll have a private room with attached bath. You'll also have access to a central courtyard, a living and dining room area, and two addition rooms used for welcoming guests.

Other things to note
Siddiq Manziel 1936 is located "inside" of Mehrauli, making it slightly difficult to access. The closest intersection is Mehta Chowk were taxis are able to come and go. From there just a short 50 meter walk remains to the front door.

Insta @indaia.studios
Welcome to our centrally located stylish and minimalistic fully furnished studio apartment with an attached bathroom & a kitchen, equipped with all the modern amenities. Our property is situated at Ashram chowk which is very convenient location to go all around Delhi and well connected with all kind of public transport specially just 2 min walk from Delhi Metro (Ashram metro station).

The space
Our beautifully designed studio apartment offers a blend of aesthetic and modern charm, providing you with a comfortable and unique stay. Whether you're a solo traveler, a couple on a romantic escape, or here for business, you'll find this place to be your perfect stay.

Features:

- Comfy King-Sized Bed: Sink into a luxurious King-sized bed with a plush mattress, ensuring a restful night's sleep after your adventures in the bustling city.

Sofa cum bed: There's an Ikea sofa cum-bed in this apartment which can be used for sitting or as single bed at night for the third person.

Dining Area : Beautiful Ikea dining table which can be used by 2 to 3 people.

Fully functional kitchen - You can cook in our beautiful kitchen includes amenities like cooking burner, fridge, microwave oven, toaster, kettle, pans and crockery, wine glasses, etc.


- Private En-Suite Bathroom: Your room boasts a modern and clean en-suite bathroom with a shower, fresh towels, and essential toiletries for your convenience.

- Ample Storage: A spacious built in cupboard provides plenty of storage space for your belongings, so you can feel right at home.

- Work/Study Nook: If you need to catch up on work or plan your day, there's a cozy desk and chair where you can get things done, complete with high-speed Wi-Fi.

- Abundant Natural Light: Large window floods the room with natural light during the day, creating an airy and inviting atmosphere.



- TV- A modern Samsung smart tv with all the OTT built inn platforms connected with high speed internet.

- AC: Stay comfortable year-round with air conditioning.

Location:

Our residence is ideally situated in the heart of New Delhi, at Ashram Chowk, allowing you easy access to all parts of New Delhi.. Excellent public transportation links make it effortless to explore Delhi's rich culture and historical sites. Ashram Chowk Metro Station is just 2 minutes walking from here.

Interaction with Guests:

We respect your privacy but are also available to provide any assistance, recommendations, or insights you may require during your stay. Whether you're seeking dining suggestions, local insights, or travel advice, we're here to make your stay as enjoyable as possible.

We eagerly await the opportunity to host you and ensure your stay is a memorable one!**

Also enjoy access to our warm living room, fully equipped kitchen with dining and back patio. It has everything you need for a restful & comfortable stay in South Delhi.

The space
Experience ease of location & modern luxury at our ground-floor Airbnb in F-Block Saket, a quiet and gated, tree-lined enclave with 24x7 security, ample parking and even wandering peacocks.

As you enter the home, soft colours, cozy décor, and artwork set a warm tone. The living room connects seamlessly to the three bedrooms, kitchen, dining area, and small patio.

description:
The Terrace Penthouse is completely private, expansive 2500 sqft. of luxurious space, engulfed in greenery, with all modern amenities and creature comforts comparable to a suite.
Our location in Lutyens is posh, prime, and super convenient. The neighborhood is extremely safe, manned with guards, and 24/7 security surveillance.
The caretaker will help with errands within the premises and is available 7 days a week.
For your convenience, there is 1 dedicated parking space within the premises.

The space
The Terrace Penthouse is a very large space, a private haven in the middle of the hustle bustle of the city yet in an ultra exclusive neighbourhood in Lutyens Delhi and arguably the most premium space on Airbnb in Delhi. Our proximity to historical landmarks, beautiful parks, hotels, and prime markets make it an enviable place to stay.

There's a king-size bed, soft spring 8" mattress, 3 sizes of pillows, smart tv, 24/7 WiFi, Alexa Ecco Show, safe, zebra blinds, and closet.
The kitchenette has an induction cooker, microwave, toaster, mini-fridge, hot water kettle, crockery & cutlery.
The bathroom is an onyx and french gold design masterpiece with pressured water.

The Terrace Penthouse is an ideal retreat for couples looking for beautiful romantic space that's completely private. You're surrounded by plants and flowers in the Terrace garden and have a beautiful sit out on the ample outdoor sofas. An awning covers the very large patio, which can also be used as a sit out during the rains. There's a very striking bar counter in the outdoor terrace where one can sip on a glass of wine!

Travelers with families or just ladies can feel very safe knowing we've got 24hr security, electronic keypad entry, electronic laptop safe, private parking within the premises, and camera coverage in a neighborhood that has large homes well guarded with neighborhood security to add.

We're a family living in the same building, have traveled a fair bit, and understand what is important to most travelers.

Guest access
The terrace and room are completely private with no intrusion whatsoever. We also provide parking space for 1 car for our guests' convenience within the premises.

Other things to note
Please call the caretaker to open and close the main gate for security purposes.

Our studio apartments is furnished with
foam mattresses, Smart TV, Refrigerator, Air conditioning. There is a fully equipped kitchen with stove, chimney, microwave, with all cooking and eating utensils, where you can cook your own meals as per your requirements. The availability of small stores for everyday needs is easily accessible.

The space
The apartment in Vasant Kunj is a very peaceful one with a posh neighbourhood located in South Delhi, it is just a short 15 minute drive from the airport to the apartment, The area is known for its serene surroundings and easy access to green spaces.

While the apartment offers a peaceful environment, it is also important that you note, any medium of transportation is very easy to find. Ola, Uber, cabs and auto rickshaws (tuk tuk).

Easy access to Ambience mall vasant kunj, one of the biggest malls, and other stores for day to day needs. There are leisure activities nearby the apartment, visiting the qutub minar, mehrauli archaeological park are must-visit attractions.

Note- The apartment is on the 4th floor, with NO lift/elevator, incase of heavy luggage no need to worry, we have a porter arranged to carry it.

Incase of a power cut which is beyond our control, we request you to be patient until the electricity is back.

How to get around-

Airports
- T3 airport (6.8.4km)
- T2 airport (6.7km)
- T1 airport (4.8km)

Metros
- vasant vihar metro (magenta line) (3.6km)
- aerocity metro (airport line) (3.4km)
- chattarpur metro (yellow line) (3.6km)

Also, the parking spot for the apartment is located on the street in front of the building, incase other cars are parked in that area, no need to worry, there are plenty of spots around the building.

Guest access
You'll have access to the complete apartment with a separate entry so there are no interruptions. Privacy of our guests is of utmost importance to us. The staircase leads straight to the main outside door. The apartment is on a different floor so there's no point of unnecessary disturbances. Just enjoy the calmness of this peaceful neighborhood.

Also, Please take care of your belongings and valuables, management will not be responsible of any loss.

Other things to note
Certain rules and regulations we would like our guests to follow when they choose to stay in our house:

-No additional guest is allowed inside the house then amount listed on our original reservation.
-Smoking is not allowed inside the apartment, it is allowed outside in the terrace area.
-No consumption of any drug or narcotic substances anywhere in the premises.
-Guests will be required to pay for any damage.
-Parties of any kind are strictly not allowed.
-Please refrain from playing loud music inside the house, it may disturb the neighbours.
-Violation of any house rules will lead to the termination of booking and the guest will have to vacate the property immediately without any prior notice.
-Kindly switch off all the electric appliances and fittings including the air-con before leaving the room.
-Pets are not allowed.
- Keep noise at minimum after 10PM.

We kindly request you to keep this house as your own home :)

description:
Built inside a renovated 1960s electronics factory, the Red House is a cultural centre — now open to stay in. Constructed by hand by a-nuclear-physicist-turned-artist with brick and lime, it has been hosting film screenings, exhibitions, and workshops since 2022.

The premises is ideal for those who would like to switch off and escape while firmly still being within the city. One can walk barefoot in the lush Gothic garden, listen to the birds all day, and have a candlelight dinner on the roof!

The space
The private room has two single beds framed by floor-to-ceiling white sheer drapes, a sitting area with cane chairs, a work desk, and a glass-enclosed shower. The flooring is traditional matted throughout, storage is a custom-built with rattan doors, and windows are diamond-shaped jalis. The room connects directly to the kitchen through a door, which guests can keep closed for full privacy. The architecture draws inspiration from John Ruskin, William Morris (after whom in fact the space has been named) and Laurie Baker.

The aforementioned private attached kitchenette is fully functional and has a mini fridge, 2 induction plates, saucepan, microwave, tea and coffee sachets, milk powder, and sugar. There are all the necessary utensils and cutlery, glasses, cups for you to use as well, of course, all arranged in a rack near the basin (which we would request you to use and keep back as they have been placed).

The walls of the kitchen are deep red, and a sign above the counter reads 'All Sorrows Abandon Ye Who Enter Here' after Dante Alighieri, and we mean it! The Airbnb is designed in a way that one can't help but feel at peace in it. You may in fact not believe you are in Delhi at all - and we're not kidding.

Please note that since we follow Jain customs, only vegetarian food may be cooked or ordered on the premises.

The private toilet is just outside the room, through an alleyway with exposed brick walls, with a vessel sink on stone counter.

Most rarely in Delhi, our place boasts of a full green private courtyard, and is a proper green lung, overflowing with trees, flowering plants, and brick pathways. The aforementioned terrace above has an outdoor dining area under a red pergola strung with fairy lights, and a large Picasso-inspired mural made by 28 Red House artists running all along the wall. It's the kind of place you sit down in for ten minutes and end up staying two hours.

AC, fast Wi-Fi, and power backup are available throughout the property. Free dedicated parking on-site also.

Guest access
Your room is your own private space, with two windows and interior doors that close off the kitchen and courtyard when you need some quiet.

Only registered guests are permitted on the property. No additional visitors allowed.

Other things to note
1. The Red House is very accessible via public transport. The nearest metro station is Jasola Apollo and is only 10 minutes away by auto or cab, bookable via Uber, Ola, or Rapido.

2. The Red House is not currently wheelchair accessible.

3. We would be needing government IDs like passport, license, voter or Aadhaar for all the guests staying. Visa copy required for foreign visitor and Visitor register may need to be signed.

4. Please note, importantly, that the room has a matted floor, and smoking is strictly not allowed, as the mat may burn and cause serious fire hazard. You may step outside the compound to smoke.

5. Grocery and food delivery is widely available through apps like Zomato, Swiggy, and Blinkit.

Geographically, the Red House is in one of South Delhi's most connected and underrated neighbourhoods — close to the Okhla Bird Sanctuary, Saket, Greater Kailash, and New Friends Colony.

description:
Welcome to Sadharan Homestays! Our private studio apartment in Kailash Hills offers a comfortable stay, perfect for peaceful family & friendly stays. Loud parties are not allowed.

Located on the 3rd floor without lift, our 24/7 staff assists with luggage & more.

Cook like a pro in fully equipped kitchen, or grab groceries & call our cook for homely meals.

Enjoy King bed, washroom, balcony, kitchenette & hot/cold AC for comfort in all seasons.

Save 18% on business bookings with GST invoice!

The space
Our home is located in a green, safe, and upscale neighborhood, offering excellent connectivity to major city landmarks like India Gate, ISKCON Temple, and Lotus Temple.

Key Details
Location: The building has ground + 4 floors, and your stay will be on the third floor. While we don’t have an elevator, our caretaker and staff are available 24/7 to assist with luggage, stairs, or anything else you may need. We also respect your privacy, ensuring a peaceful and undisturbed stay.

Your Space Includes

1. King-size bed, a compact desk with a chair, and a TV for entertainment.

2. Attached Bathroom: Private and fully equipped with all the essentials.

3. A compact balcony with a washing machine.

4. Kitchenette: A compact, well-equipped space designed for culinary enthusiasts. It includes a two-burner hob and pipelined gas for cooking essentials. The kitchen is stocked with aluminum-free steel and iron cookware for healthy meals. We also provide steel and glass utensils, ensuring no plastic touches your food. For beverage options, there are wine glasses, beer mugs, and more. The kitchenette includes appliances such as a kettle, toaster, egg boiler, sandwich maker, air fryer, microwave, and refrigerator. Basic spices and oils are provided to start cooking. If cooking isn’t your thing, a cook is available at no extra cost to prepare North or South Indian dishes with your groceries. Upon arrival, you’ll find complimentary drinks and snacks as a one-time gesture.

Host Availability
I am Kunal Khanna, your host, available 24/7 to assist with anything you may need and to ensure a smooth stay.

Please read the house rules in the next section for a seamless experience.

Guest access
The images of the apartment you see is completely private and not shared by anyone else.

Other things to note
If you have any questions, just send them through the message box, and you'll get a response in minutes, or maybe even seconds 😉.

description:
DEAR GUESTS, IT'S MANDATORY TO READ PROPERTY DETAILS AND HOUSE RULES BEFORE BOOKING. ONLY EXPECT WHAT OUR PROPERTY IS OFFERING. YOUR DEMEANOUR MUST BE IN ACCORDANCE OF OUR HOUSE RULES. PLEASE DON'T BOOK IF YOU DON'T AGREE WITH WHAT I ASKED FOR. 🙏🌷

Our well located, park facing, corner home in Lajpat Nagar-II is on the lllrd floor. There is no lift; you will have to take the stairs. Famous Lajpat Nagar market is our next door. Nearest Metro station is a two Min walk. Its a family home stay.

The space
The fully furnished private guest bedroom and ensuite bathroom are inside our residential home where host stay

Guest bedroom has all the decent amenities complimentary for comfortable staying like premium quality linens, Electric bed warmer, mirror, wardrobe, refrigerator 510 ltr, Electric kettle, Split AC, Room heater, Mosquito net, sleepers ect.

Sorry guests there is no TV in your room

Ensuite bathroom is furnished with complimentary high quality towels( one bath towel and one small hand towel) gyeser, pouches of shampoo and conditioner, tooth paste, bathing soap, liquid hand wash, hair dryer, pair of sleepers ect

fastest WiFi is also complimentary

We have power backup facility at home to run lights and fans

Free parking is available on the road. Getting parking space is not difficult but sometimes you may have to juggle for it

Our self help kitchen is a fully equipped and shared space, which every guest can access to make own breakfast but for cooking lunch and dinner minimum one week booking is required.

Semiautomatic washing machine for laundry wash is offered complimentary. To avail washing machine, minimum 5 days booking is required. Guest needs to buy detergent powder for washing own clothes.
Washing and ironing of the cloths are also available outside home

Milk booth is in front of our home a big advantage for the guests who have longer stays. Milk booth stocks everything we need in our daily life like Milk, Bread, butter, Butter milk, Lassi, cheese, curd, ice cream ect

Daily need stores, vegitable vendors and grocery shops are around and within reach besides shopping apps Blinkit and Zepto too deliver orders with in 15 minutes at the apartment. Buying necessary commodities is super easy for the guest who is scheduled to stay longer

On order Home Made food by Tiffin Service are available at a nominal price of Rs 100-150 per person.
Online food order through Zumato, Swiggy ect are delivered right at the door of apartment on lllrd floor


Currency exchange shop is also at a few steps away

National, International eating joints are close to our home within a short walk.
Some eating joints at walking distance too offer Indian lunch dinner at a fair price, much cheaper than the what hosts charge from the guests

The roads are wide and approachable for easy access to our home. All kind of transportations are around. Metro station is located at walking distance of 2 minute. Autos and manual Rickshaws are present at the door step down the stairs besides App based taxis are also just a call away receives you and drops you at our gate

Approx distance from our home to famous places by road are as under for your kind knowing :

* HOSPITALS within 1/2km and little above: Moolchand Hospital, RG stone, National Heart Institute, Metro Hospital

*HOSPITALS little above 3km : AIIMS, Safdarjang, Fortis Escort

*5 STAR HOTELS : Eros 1.9km, Oberoi 3.3km, Surya 3.7km, Hyatt Regency 6km, Claridges 6km, Taj Mansingh 6.3km, Le Meridian 8.8km, Hotel Ashoka 9.9 km, Taj Palace 11km, ITC Maurya 11km

*FOREIGN EMBASSIES : within 8/9 km

*SIRI FORT AUDITORIUM : 3.5km

* ISKON TEMPLE : 2.5km

* LOTUS TEMPLE : 4km

* QUTUB MINAR : 9km

* DELHI HAAT : 5km

* SAFDARJUNG TOMB : 5.5km

* Qutub Minar, Delhi Haat and Safdarjung Tomb are on the same stretch and share the same Metro Yellow line which comply between Gurgaon and Cannaught Place crossing above halts including Jan path

* INDIA HABITAT CENTER : 5km

* India Habitat Center, India International Center, Lodhi Garden, Safdarjung Tomb, Humayun Tomb, and Khan Market close to each other within the radius : 1/2km approx

* INDIA GATE : 7km

* CANNAUGHT PLACE : 10km

* India Gate, Rashtrapati Bhawan and Cannaught Place are within the radius : 2.5km

* AKHSHAR DHAM : 9km

* PRAGATI MAIDAN : 6km

* JAWAHAR LAL NEHRU STADIUM ( JLN ) : 4-1/2 Km

* DELHI HIGH COURT : 6km

* SUPREME COURT : 7km

* OLD DELHI and RED FORT : 12.5km

* NIZAMUDIN RAILWAY STATION from where you can get the train for Mathura, Agra and Goa is connected with pink line the nearest metro station a 2 minutes walk from our home. The distance by road : 4km

* NEW DELHI RAILWAY STATION : 11.5km

* INDIRA GANDHI INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT : 16km

Last but not the least, I am accessible as a host most of the time for the right guidance and suggestions if the guest asks for

Guest access
Besides private guest bedroom and ensuite bathroom which guest has booked, they can access common areas of the house too. Such as: Living room, dining table, kitchen and front side balcony which opens towards main road

What guests can't access is our bedroom, bathroom and our personal refrigerator in the Kitchen

Oven is available in the kitchen for reheating and novelising the outside food.

Uses of water is free. Filtered water for drinking is available in the kitchen

Other things to note
Please don't expect hotel culture at home.

As the guests expect a perfect stay similarly host also expect the stay of the guest perfect. It's a two way effort

Please a porter which can be hired to drop luggage on 3rd floor with prior notice. He charges Rs 50-70 per luggage depending upon the weight.

Guests are handed over, room and bathroom wrinkle free, clean and sanitised. Guests too required to maintain the room and bathroom clean and tidy through out their stay according to Airbnb guest's guidelines

There is a season when Mosquitoes breed naturally, guests who are more sensitive to mosquito are requested to buy their own remedies during stay incase you find my arrangements not enough for you

During stays, guests can come and go anytime as per their requirements. There are no restrictions till 1am

Guests, who genuinely can come at official check-in time after 2pm can book the same day

Uses of electricity are offered free. Just for the knowledge of our guests, Split AC consumes 1 and 1/2 unit per hour(Rs 12 per hour), Geyser consumes 2 unit per hour(Rs16 per hour) and room heater consumes Rs 18 per hour, nothing is chargeable. Bed warmer, other electric gadgets and lights too are complimentary therefore you are requested please utilise everything sensibly. Always shut off AC, Geyser, Room heater, bed warmer, lights before going out. Your genuineness can save exorbitant bill paid by the host

Guests are informed, kindly don't change the setting of digital refrigerator 510Ltr without our permission. It can damage our expensive gadget

We have arranged, best of amenities for your lovely stays. Admire it and use them decently. Don't spoil amenities by using them recklessly thinking free. All the stuffs given for uses are host's property, guests are not authorised to take them out. kindly make sure nothing should be found missing after the checkout

If any damage happens during your stay, please don’t worry, hesitate or hide it, inform me asap. I will make sure to fix it fast in time. Your quick and timely response will not only save you from further unpleasant stay, rather me and upcoming new guest will also be saved from getting into trouble in the nick of time. All you need to inform me asap. I believe the peace of mind is most important thing in our life

Guests are informed please don't cook or bring non-veg inside kitchen during sacred Hindu auspicious 9 days of Navratri festival which falls twice in a year between March/April and Sep/Oct. However guests can eat non-veg inside their room or outside home🙏

description:
Modern & Stylish fully private & independent fully furnished 2 beds 2 baths flat in quiet, safe & gated neighbourhood. The flat is at independent floor 3 with private entry on a 4 storey building. Please note : car parking is NOT available, however you can arrive to our doorstep using cab easily.

The space
Stay includes:
1. WiFi 150/mbps,
2. Total 2 ACs in both bedrooms.
3. Smart 55 inch TV with OTTs available like Netflix, Amazon prime etc.
4. Fully functional kitchen with RO filtered water, fridge, microwave, gas and utensils,
5. Fully furnished with two Queen Beds which sleeps 4 adults, a five seater sofa and cabinets. Washing machine also available
6. Lift access from parking level to all floors. Parking is NOT included in stay.
7. CCTV camera security 24x7, Security Guard on site night time,
8. Restaurant, pharmacy and clinics nearby within 300m.
9. Only 10 min walk from Preet Vihar Metro Station (900m),
10. Only 20 min walk from V3S Mall (1.6KM)
11. Near Max Hospital, Patparganj (2.5 KM)
12. Complementary Housekeeping including mopping & dusting only provided every alternate day as per guest's request. Laundry cleaning or dishes washing is NOT included.
13. Anand Vihar Railway Station is just 3.5 KM
14. New Delhi Railway Station is just 10 KM
15. IGI Airport is 27 KM
16. Total 2 Room heating portable blowers available
17. Power Backup through Inverter is included but power cuts are very rare in this part of Delhi.

Guest access
1. Common area like Garage and Lift
2. Private Area like the entire independent Flat 2 bed 2 bath with private entry

Other things to note
1. Total 2 ACs are available including in both bedrooms. Total 2 Portable heaters are available in both bedrooms.
1.1. The living room does not have AC but has ceiling fan and doesn’t need AC if master bedroom AC is on.
2. No smoking please.
3. No undeclared guests allowed.
4. Up to 4 adults only allowed in each stay.
5. Any form of parties / decorations like Birthday, Wedding related events etc are not allowed in the flat. It’s for residential purpose only.
6. For checkin: Checkin time is 1pm. Gates open only at 10AM for baggage drop-off (if coming earlier than check-in time) then you can later checking 1pm. Sorry entry before 10AM is NOT allowed. Late checkin after 1pm is allowed any time of day/night. We will give gate keys to you for late checkin
7. Guests must present valid photo ID at check-in. Government regulations require every person over 18 staying at the AirBnB to carry valid photo ID. Accepted forms include Aadhar Card, Driving License, Voter ID Card, and Passport.

Important Note on Parking 🚗🚫
Please note that we do NOT provide reserved parking with this Airbnb. We want to be transparent so you can plan accordingly!

Your Parking Options:
1. ✅ RECOMMENDED: Paid MCD Parking (400m away): "Baldev Park MCD Parking" (searchable on Maps). 📍
2. Alternative Paid Parking (2km away): "V3S Mall Parking." 🏢 (searchable on Maps). 📍
3. Street Parking at your risk: Free, but based on availability (first-come, first-served). 🅿️ ⚠️ Crucial: If parking on the street, please do NOT block neighbors' driveways or their parking spots.

Welcome to Ahana, a charming and well-furnished space in the heart of South Delhi. Perfect for travelers, professionals, or families, this home offers modern amenities, including high-speed WiFi, air conditioning, lift and a well-equipped kitchen. Located near Nehru Place and Lotus Temple, it provides easy metro access. Situated in a secure, gated community, we also offer a free parking slot on request. Enjoy a peaceful and convenient stay with us!

The space
The property is a 1BHK with an attached bathroom and kitchen. Located on the terrace, it offers an open space where you can sit and relax. The terrace is shared with one other unit and family members.

Guest access
The property is private, and guests have the entire flat with shared access to the terrace.

Other things to note
House Rules:

• No Parties: Our Airbnb is intended for peaceful stays only. Parties and events are not permitted.

• No Smoking Indoors: Smoking inside the property is strictly prohibited.

• Designated Smoking Area: Guests are welcome to smoke outside on the terrace.

• Housekeeping: We provide basic daily cleaning. Utensil washing is available at an additional cost.

We kindly request you to treat the property as your own and help us maintain it with care.

description:
Welcome to your luxury, chic, modern studio!

Ideal for couples or business travelers.

Enjoy upscale amenities: A spacious King-sized bed , Air Conditioning in both the living and bedroom area and a fully equipped self-catering kitchenette (microwave, fridge).

Highlights include a Mini Bar, keyless smart lock, a Vanity with Podium for makeovers, and a stunning designer bathroom.

Features a private balcony with seating and a washing area access.

Book your cozy retreat now!

The space
Design & Layout:
Contemporary Chic: Bright, airy space with an emphasis on white, gold, and neutral tones.

Luxurious Touches: White wall panelling/moulding and sophisticated marble-effect flooring throughout.

Dedicated Areas: The apartment efficiently segments into living, dining, kitchen, and bedroom zones.

Key Features:
Sleeping: 1 King-sized bed with plush headboard and high-quality linens.

A vanity: In Master bedroom, there is a vanity with
podium for a perfect makeover.

Living: Comfortable sofa, elegant floor lamp, and a modern dining table for two.

Dining Area: Just in front of Kitchen there is small dining area for sitting of two people.

Balcony Garden: A small balcony with sitting for two people and access to Washing area.

Kitchenette: Fully functional compact kitchen with a sink, induction/stove, chimney, microwave, and refrigerator. Basic cooking essentials and dining ware are provided (as seen on the table).

Bathroom: Modern design with patterned feature tiles, a stylish bowl-sink, and a mirror. Hot and cold water available.

Climate Control: Air conditioning unit in the bedroom and Living area.

Security: Keyless entry via a modern smart lock for easy, secure access.

Storage: Ample storage space in the white, glossy wardrobes in both Living area and Bedroom

Guest access
Guests will have exclusive and private access to the entire studio apartment, including:

The main living, dining, and sleeping area.

The fully equipped kitchenette.

The private attached bathroom.

The small balcony/utility area with the washing machine.

Self check-in is made simple and secure with the keyless smart lock. Detailed instructions and the access code will be provided prior to arrival.

Other things to note
Parking: Street parking is available in front of the apartment. You can park along side with park area anywhere.

Utility Area: The washing machine is located on the small private balcony, available for guest use.

Location/View: The apartment offers a view of a street with trees and parked vehicles, typical of a well-located residential area.

Noise: Please be mindful that this is a residential building, and we ask that guests respect quiet hours after 10 PM.

No Smoking Policy: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment.

You can check the house rules and other instructions on Dining table.

description:
Stylish 3BHK Apartment in the Heart of Delhi (West Delhi near Rajouri Garden/ CK Birla Hospital) | Family-Friendly & Fully Furnished
Welcome to your home away from home! This spacious and modern 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom apartment is nestled in a prime location of Delhi—perfect for families, business travelers, or groups looking to explore the vibrant capital city in comfort and style.
STRICTLY NOT AVAILABLE FOR PARTIES Please read the detailed description & house rules

The space
🛏 Bedrooms: Three well-appointed rooms with queen-size beds, premium linens, ample storage, and AC in each room.
🛁 Bathrooms: Three clean, modern bathrooms with 24/7 hot water and basic toiletries.
🍳 Kitchen: Fully equipped with a stove, refrigerator, microwave, and utensils—ideal for home-cooked meals.
🛋 Living Area: Cozy lounge with a smart TV, fast Wi-Fi, and a dining area that seats six.
🌇 Balcony: Enjoy your morning coffee with a city view or unwind after a long day.

✅ Extras:

High-speed Wi-Fi

Washing machine

Elevator access

Free parking for 1 car

✅ Rental Inclusions:
* Fully equipped Kitchen with all basic appliances (Microwave, Gas Stove, Mixer Grinder, Refrigerator, Toaster, Electric kettle and RO Water Purifier), cookware and serveware.
* Fresh Linen (including bedsheets, bath & face towels) will be provided at the time of check-in and every fourth day.
* Daily Housekeeping is provided once a day at a fixed time.
(includes Dusting, Brooming, Mopping and Dishes)
* Free Wi-Fi
* 30 Units of complementary electricity will provided every day for booking less than 14 nights, extra units will be charged ₹ 10 per unit.
* Toiletries - Shower Gel, Shampoo, Hand Wash, Hand Towels, Bath Towels, Hair dryer and Tissue Rolls.
* Washing Machine detergent to be arranged by guest.

✅Add Ons:
* Complimentary linen and towel change is given every 4th day. Additional linen change (if required more frequently) is chargeable at INR 500 per room per time
* Electricity charges for all bookings longer than 14 days are chargeable as per actual consumption based on the number of units consumed in the meter reading x INR 10 per unit.


~ Meals & Dining:
Home delivery of food can easily be ordered in by the guests staying at our apartment from various delivery restaurants in the vicinity, ranging from cuisines like Asian, Indian, Italian, Continental, Fast Food, Korean, Japanese, etc. Home delivery of food can also be ordered using Swiggy and Zomato apps, which can bring your favorite food to our place, within minutes.

~ Grocery & Medicine Delivery:
* Groceries and medicines can be easily ordered in for doorstep delivery through various delivery apps.
* A supermarket, pharmacy and organic vegetables and fruit store is located at a walking distance.

Cab facilities like Uber, Ola, Rapido and many other services can be called within 5 minutes at any time of the day or night.

*Furry friends are most welcomed .
> Pet should be toilet trained.
> Pets are strictly not allowed on the sofas or beds.
> Pets mess to be taken care by the guests.
> Pet should not roam in the building unleashed

📍 Location Highlights:

Centrally located with easy access to public transport

Close to markets, cafes, and historical landmarks like India Gate and Connaught Place

Ideal for both short and long stays

Book your stay and experience the charm of Delhi with the comfort and privacy of a full apartment!

~ Key Distances:
Rajouri garden Metro station: 1 KM / 5 Mins
BLK Hospital: 7 Km / 20 Mins
Sir Ganga Ram Hospital: 9 Km / 25 Mins
Rajouri Garden Market: 2 KM / 10 Mins
IGI Airport: 15 Km / 40 mins

Connaught Place / Central Delhi: 12 Km / 35 Mins

Other things to note
*PLEASE NOTE*
~ This is a private home, and not a hotel. Please do not expect hotel kind of services at the property. We focus on cleanliness, good quality well maintained linen, and homely comfort for our guests.
~We do not allow any parties/ get togethers/ rituals in the property.
~ Loud music is not allowed. However guests can enjoy music at a decent volume.
~ We do not allow smoking inside the apartment . One can smoke in the balcony.
~ Documentation like ID Proof's etc will be required to be submitted at the time of check in.

description:
Welcome to Green View, Saket: a luxurious and charming, 3-bedroom, ground-floor apartment in prime South Delhi. Located 5 mins from Malviya Nagar Metro, PVR Anupam & Select City/ DLF Malls.

3 en-suite bedrooms with king beds, attached baths, air-conditioning, heaters, air purifiers, smart TVs, and premium linen. Relax in the sunny living room, full kitchen with dining, and step out into a large park, opposite the house. A calm, green and convenient city getaway.

The space
Welcome to our private + serviced residence in F-Block, Saket — a fully gated, secure and tree-lined neighbourhood with 24x7 security, ample parking, multiple parks and playgrounds, and even wandering peacocks.

✨ What guests love
• Ground floor home (wheelchair accessible)
• Park-facing on two sides + corner home
• All bedrooms en-suite with attached baths
• Premium bed & bath linen
• 3 king-sized beds (70”×72”) + extra mattresses
• 4 high-capacity ductless AC units + portable heaters

• High-speed Wi-Fi (300 Mbps++)
• 4 Xiaomi air purifiers (clean, breathable indoor air)
• High-capacity geysers (25L) in all bathrooms

• Daily housekeeping, cleaning and dishwashing included with your stay

Guest access
🛏️ 3 Bedrooms (Ibis, Swan, Heron)
King beds, attached baths, ACs, heating, air purifiers, smart TVs, workstations, wardrobes, blackout blinds and premium linen.

🚿 Bathrooms with rain showers, geysers, fresh towels and essentials.

Spacious and sunlit. Park-facing. Plush sofa set, 50" smart TV, air conditioning, oil heater, air purifier, books and board games.

For comfortable evenings spent indoors.

🍜 Full Kitchen
PNG hob, microwave, fridge/freezer, RO water filter, blender and drip coffee maker. Complete cookware & tableware, plus pantry essentials including tea, coffee, spices and cooking oils.

Cozy open-air patio with washing machine & tumble dryer, ideal for long stays.

🪻Parks
Steps from multiple serene neighbourhood parks, featuring clay jogging tracks, wide lawns and plenty of greenery. Great for children, long walks and sports/ badminton.

Other things to note
🍽️ Cafés & Dining
Located in one of Delhi’s best dining districts, with cafés, restaurants, and quick delivery via Zomato & Swiggy.

• Eldeco Centre (≈2 mins) – popular cafés & fine dining
• PVR Anupam (≈2 mins) – cinema complex with Haldiram’s, McDonald’s, KFC, Subway, Domino’s & more
• Select CityWalk & DLF Avenue (≈500 m) – Big Chill, Vietnom, Burma Burma, Anardana, Starbucks, Café Delhi Heights, PVR INOX & flagship shopping

Blinkit & Instamart deliver groceries within minutes. Nearby local vendors also bring fresh produce right to the doorstep.

🛍️ Shopping
Select CityWalk & DLF Avenue (≈500 m). Hauz Khas Village, Shahpur Jat & Mehrauli (≈10 mins). GK, Lajpat Nagar & Vasant Kunj (≈15–20 mins).

👗 Wedding Shopping
Close to couture houses including Sabyasachi, Tarun Tahiliani, Anita Dongre, Manish Malhotra, Ritu Kumar & Falguni Shane Peacock.

🌿 Culture & Green Spaces
Qutub Minar (≈10 mins), Deer Park, Sanjay Van, Kiran Nadar Museum, Lodhi Gardens, Sundar Nursery & Dilli Haat. India Gate, Humayun’s Tomb, Chandni Chowk & Red Fort (≈15–25 mins).

🏋️ Fitness
Cultfit, Anytime Fitness and Saket Sports Complex (≈5 mins) with swimming, tennis, badminton & yoga.

🏥 Healthcare
Near Max Saket, Rainbow Children’s Hospital, PSRI, AIIMS & Safdarjung.

🚇 Connectivity
Malviya Nagar Metro (≈5 mins / 500 m). Uber & Ola easily available. Secure parking for 4+ cars.

🏡 Family-Friendly Area
Safe, gated neighbourhood with parks, walking spaces, a nearby badminton court, and occasional peacock sightings.

🏠 House Note
Quiet residential neighbourhood. No parties. Calm gatherings allowed with prior notice.

description:
Looking for a place that feels like home but still gives you your own space? You've found it!
This private room in a ЗBHK apartment is perfect for independent travelers who love a mix of privacy and social interaction. Some nights, you might find yourself deep in conversation with a fellow traveler over dinner; other times, you might just want to unwind in your own cozy space. However you choose to experience your stay, this home is here to provide comfort, warmth, and a sense of belonging.

The space
You’ll have a cozy private room in a 3BHK apartment shared with fellow Airbnb travelers. Please note that the room does not have an attached washroom inside the room. The private washroom is located just outside the room and is exclusively for your use.

The apartment features a modern kitchen, a compact living area, a beautifully decorated common balcony, and a spacious open terrace.

The property is located on the third floor (no lift) in Defence Colony A Block — one of Delhi’s most premium and sought-after neighborhoods. Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium is just 1.5 km away, and the central location offers easy access to Delhi’s major attractions, cafés, markets, and restaurants.

Guest access
When you book this listing, you’ll have full access to your private room, which comes with an private washroom but not “attached to the room” for your exclusive use.

You’ll also have access to the shared common areas, including:
• A fully functional kitchen, perfect for cooking your meals
• A comfortable living hall, ideal for relaxing or socializing with other guests
•. The property includes a common balcony styled like a mini garden, which is shared among all guests.

Other things to note
House Rules & Important Notes :

1. Shared 3BHK Space – This is a shared apartment, so you will meet other guests during your stay.

2. Common Areas – The kitchen, living hall, and balconies are shared spaces. Please be mindful and respectful of other guests.

3. Smoking Policy – Smoking is only allowed in the balcony. It is strictly prohibited inside the room or any indoor common space. If found, a fine will be charged based on the condition of the house.

4. No Loud Music – Please keep the noise level low to ensure a comfortable stay for everyone.

5. Quiet Hours – We maintain quiet hours from 10 PM to 6 AM. Kindly be respectful of other guests and neighbors during this time.

6. Check-in & Check-out – Late check-in or check-out should be discussed in advance.

7. Personal Belongings – Guests are responsible for their own belongings when they leave. Please double-check before checking out.

8. Visitors Policy – No extra visitors are allowed. If you are expecting someone, please inform the host in advance and provide their valid ID for approval.

9. Parking – The property does not have dedicated parking, but free parking is available nearby.

10. No Lift Available – The apartment is located on the 3rd floor, and you will need to use the stairs.

11. Common Building – This is a shared residential building, and each floor is independently occupied. While we ensure our space is clean, we are not responsible for the cleanliness of the common areas outside our property. If you notice anything outside that isn’t well-maintained, please understand that it is beyond our control and does not reflect the condition of our apartment.


Please note: please provide your Valid IDs Before check-in. Also, we do not allow local bookings.
If the guests are holding local IDs, the booking will not be accepted. Kindly avoid booking in that case.

The room itself includes charging station with international sockets, basic cutlery, face and hand tissues, essential toiletries like body wash, shampoo , shaving foam, etc. There is a kettle provided to the guests.

Breakfast is included in the stay. Extra home cooked Indian meals can be provided to guests on request.

Our home is spacious and the hosts are willing to make your stay feel like home away from home. The neighborhood is quite green, room overlooks a big park ideal for yoga, walks and meditation. The locality is a peaceful residential area and a preferred choice for foreigners and expats. There are many local markets nearby where you can try your hands at street shopping and street food. Guests can access the living room and the kitchen.

Supermarket, Grocery Stores and Medicine Shops are within 50 metres of the house. The hosts are more than happy to call for supplies as most shops deliver for free at home.

Guest access
1. Open Kitchen - Feel free to use it to make your own meal.
2. You can store your food item in the fridge and use the microwave.
3. Common Area/Lounge with TV and comfortable Sofa.
4. Tea/Coffee Making Facilities. Kettle provided in the room
5. Laundry facilities
6. Dining Area

During your stay
Our services go much beyond providing a place to sleep: we give you the support to make your stay in Delhi an unforgettable and pleasant moment. You come as a friend and leave as a family member.

Since we have been living in the locality for over 30 years we have seen the city grow and develop. We can help in arranging transport like cabs etc and also share information on how to get utility services like dry cleaning etc within affordable rates.

Guests are welcome to chat or discuss options/decisions regarding travel/itinerary, knowing India and its culture, shopping, transportation, etc.

Other things to note
All guest should carry their govt. approved ID proof such as photo license, Aadhaar card, passports, etc

We provide storage services even after your trip in Delhi.. so that you can leave your luggage if you want to and can pick them up on your own convenience. You can store your bags in our storage room after your trip for Rs 100 up-to 2 bags per day. Please contact host.

The space
Space and Design
Our home embodies a celebration of minimalist design and natural light. The interiors are thoughtfully curated to foster a serene and clutter-free environment, allowing you to relax and unwind in style. Rooms are infused with natural light, thanks to large windows that frame beautiful views of the surrounding greenery. The Bedrooms
Each of the three bedrooms serves as a sanctuary of tranquility, designed to ensure a restful night's sleep. The second and third bedrooms are generously sized, each furnished with comfortable king-sized beds and ample storage space. All rooms are air-conditioned, keeping you cool even on the warmest days.

description:
Huge Luxurious studio in the posh GK-1 locality of south Delhi. Moolchand and kailash colony metro stations are a short walk. The place is tastfully done with modern style & top of the line furnishings & fixtures+WIFI. There is 1 ensuite bath & huge balcony+fully equipped kitchen. N&M block Market are walking distance from the apartment, the markets have restaurants, cafes, shops etc. There are many convinience store close to the apartment. No parties/ get togthers allowed.

The space
Its a private, fully independent Luxurious studio on the upper ground floor with lift access. The studio apartment has a kingsize bed plus two sofa bed which can sleep 2 adults. There is a dining table, a huge sofa and a big 65inch smart TV with complimentry access to Amazon Prime & hotstar and high speed WIFI with a huge green balcony. There is a fully functional attached kitchen with all amenities like a water purifier, a microwave, 220 litre refrigerator, gas burner hob with chimney, toaster, kettle, pots, pans and cutlery etc. and fully automatic washing machine . Moolchand and Kailash colony metro stations are a short walk. There are many convenience stores closeby, N block Market is walking distance from the apartment which has restraunts, cafes, shops, medicine stores, mother dairy etc. The airport is about 16Km and we can arrange airport pick up and drop @Rs.1200. We can also help arrange trips for Agra, Jaipur and the Himalayas etc.

Guest access
The Entire studio apartment + balcony

Other things to note
It's a quiet neighborhood.
No loud music or get togethers permitted.
No weapons or drugs allowed.
Visitors upto a max of 2 are allowed only till 8.30pm, beyond that they will be considered as guests staying and need to pay the extra person charges.
Smoking permitted only in the balcony. Cleaning fee of Rs. 1500 shall be charge if you smoke inside the building.
Guests to be responsible for their belongings and vehicles.
All guest and visitors are required to carry a valid government issued ID or passport that can be checked by the management or caretaker or the guard upon arrival and before entering the property.
Strictly no consumption of any drugs or narcotic substances anywhere in the premises.
Kindly switch off all electrical appliances and fittings including the air-con before leaving the room, incase left on we reserve the right to enter the apartment.
Please note – Check out time is 11 am.
Please take care of your belongings and valuables, management will not be responsible of any loss.
Any damages/breakage/loss to the property shall be charged for.
Please do not take any linen, towel, accessories and amenities provided, out of the premises at any time.
Incase of a power cut which is beyond our control, only the fans and some lights would work.
